world limits)\n * - Zoom with scroll wheel (centers on cursor position)\n * - Initial view shows top-left of data (X=0, Y=0)\n * - Sidebar sync via onViewportChange callback\n *\n * Coordinate System:\n * - X: 0 = first day, positive = future (right)\n * - Y: 0 = first train (TRAIN-001), negative = more trains (down)\n *\n * References:\n * - D3.js zoom: https://d3js.org/d3-zoom\n * - Three.js OrthographicCamera: https://threejs.org/docs/api/en/cameras/OrthographicCamera.html\n * - pixi-viewport: https://github.com/pixijs-userland/pixi-viewport\n */\n\nimport { Canvas, useThree } from '@react-three/fiber';\nimport { useCallback, useMemo, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';\nimport { MesoLayer } from './layers/MesoLayer';\nimport { MacroLayer } from './layers/MacroLayer';\nimport { MicroLayer } from './layers/MicroLayer';\nimport { PerfMonitor } from '../components/PerfMonitor';\nimport type { PerfEvent } from '../components/PerfMonitor';\nimport { getRenderData } from '../data/generator';\nimport type { LODLevel, WorldBounds } from '../data/types';\nimport { DEFAULT_VIEW_CONFIG, calculateWorldBounds } from '../data/types';\nimport { useCanvasSelector, canvasActions, canvasStore } from '../state';\nimport { useSpatialIndex, type ISpatialIndex } from '../spatial';\n\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n// EXPORTED TYPES\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n/**\n * Viewport information passed to parent component\n */\nexport interface ViewportInfo {\n  /** Y coordinate of the TOP of the viewport in world space */\n  topY: number;\n  /** Left edge of the viewport in world X coordinates */\n  leftX: number;\n  /** Right edge of the viewport in world X coordinates */\n  rightX: number;\n}\n\n/**\n * Viewport bounds in world coordinates\n * Used for frustum culling - only render tasks within these bounds\n */\nexport interface ViewportBounds {\n  minX: number;\n  maxX: number;\n  minY: number;\n  maxY: number;\n}\n\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n// LOD CONFIGURATION\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n/**\n * LOD Transition Configuration\n *\n * Defines blend zones around LOD thresholds for smooth transitions.\n * During blend zones, both adjacent layers render with interpolated opacity.\n */\nconst LOD_THRESHOLDS = {\n  macroToMeso: 0.5,  // Below 0.5 = MACRO\n  mesoToMicro: 2.0,  // Above 2.0 = MICRO\n};\n\n// Size of blend zone around each threshold (±this value)\nconst BLEND_ZONE_SIZE = 0.15;\n\n/**\n * Calculate layer opacities for smooth LOD transitions\n *\n * Returns opacity values for each layer (0-1).\n * During blend zones, adjacent layers overlap with interpolated opacity.\n */\nfunction calculateLayerOpacities(zoom: number): {\n  macro: number;\n  meso: number;\n  micro: number;\n} {\n  const { macroToMeso, mesoToMicro } = LOD_THRESHOLDS;\n\n  // Define blend zone boundaries\n  const macroEnd = macroToMeso - BLEND_ZONE_SIZE; // 0.35\n  const mesoStart = macroToMeso + BLEND_ZONE_SIZE; // 0.65\n  const mesoEnd = mesoToMicro - BLEND_ZONE_SIZE; // 1.85\n  const microStart = mesoToMicro + BLEND_ZONE_SIZE; // 2.15\n\n  let macro = 0;\n  let meso = 0;\n  let micro = 0;\n\n  // Calculate MACRO opacity\n  if (zoom <= macroEnd) {\n    macro = 1;\n  } else if (zoom < mesoStart) {\n    // Blend zone MACRO → MESO\n    const t = (zoom - macroEnd) / (mesoStart - macroEnd);\n    macro = 1 - t;\n  }\n\n  // Calculate MESO opacity\n  if (zoom < macroEnd) {\n    meso = 0;\n  } else if (zoom < mesoStart) {\n    // Blend zone MACRO → MESO\n    const t = (zoom - macroEnd) / (mesoStart - macroEnd);\n    meso = t;\n  } else if (zoom <= mesoEnd) {\n    meso = 1;\n  } else if (zoom < microStart) {\n    // Blend zone MESO → MICRO\n    const t = (zoom - mesoEnd) / (microStart - mesoEnd);\n    meso = 1 - t;\n  }\n\n  // Calculate MICRO opacity\n  if (zoom <= mesoEnd) {\n    micro = 0;\n  } else if (zoom < microStart) {\n    // Blend zone MESO → MICRO\n    const t = (zoom - mesoEnd) / (microStart - mesoEnd);\n    micro = t;\n  } else {\n    micro = 1;\n  }\n\n  return { macro, meso, micro };\n}\n\n/**\n * LODLayers - Orchestrates layer rendering with smooth transitions\n *\n * Renders multiple layers simultaneously during blend zones,\n * with opacity interpolation for smooth visual transitions.\n */\nfunction LODLayers({\n  tasks,\n  trainCount,\n  zoom,\n  viewportBounds,\n  spatialIndex,\n  hoveredTaskId,\n  selectedTaskId,\n  focusedTaskId,\n}: {\n  tasks: ReturnType<typeof getRenderData>['tasks'];\n  trainCount: number;\n  zoom: number;\n  viewportBounds: ViewportBounds;\n  spatialIndex: ISpatialIndex;\n  hoveredTaskId: string | null;\n  selectedTaskId: string | null;\n  focusedTaskId: string | null;\n}) {\n  const opacities = useMemo(() => calculateLayerOpacities(zoom), [zoom]);\n\n  return (\n    <group>\n      {/* Render each layer if opacity > 0 */}\n      {opacities.macro > 0 && (\n        <MacroLayer\n          tasks={tasks}\n          trainCount={trainCount}\n          opacity={opacities.macro}\n        />\n      )}\n      {opacities.meso > 0 && (\n        <MesoLayer\n          tasks={tasks}\n          trainCount={trainCount}\n          opacity={opacities.meso}\n          viewportBounds={viewportBounds}\n          spatialIndex={spatialIndex}\n          hoveredTaskId={hoveredTaskId}\n          selectedTaskId={selectedTaskId}\n          focusedTaskId={focusedTaskId}\n        />\n      )}\n      {opacities.micro > 0 && (\n        <MicroLayer\n          tasks={tasks}\n          trainCount={trainCount}\n          opacity={opacities.micro}\n          viewportBounds={viewportBounds}\n          hoveredTaskId={hoveredTaskId}\n          selectedTaskId={selectedTaskId}\n          focusedTaskId={focusedTaskId}\n        />\n      )}\n    </group>\n  );\n}\n\n/**\n * Navigation target for programmatic navigation\n * Can specify trainIndex, dayOffset, or both\n */\nexport interface NavigationTarget {\n  /** Train index (0-based) to center on vertically */\n  trainIndex?: number;\n  /** Day offset from start date to center on horizontally */\n  dayOffset?: number;\n  /** Optional zoom level to set (defaults to current zoom) */\n  zoom?: number;\n}\n\ninterface InfiniteCanvasProps {\n  zoom: number;\n  lod: LODLevel;\n  onZoomChange: (zoom: number) => void;\n  /**\n   * Called when viewport position changes.\n   * @param viewport - Object with topY, leftX, rightX coordinates\n   */\n  onViewportChange?: (viewport: ViewportInfo) => void;\n  /**\n   * Called when the effective minimum zoom changes.\n   * Used by parent to enforce zoom limits on buttons.\n   */\n  onMinZoomChange?: (minZoom: number) => void;\n  /**\n   * Request a smooth animated zoom to target level.\n   * Called by parent buttons for +/- zoom with animation.\n   */\n  animatedZoomTarget?: number | null;\n  /**\n   * Called when animated zoom completes or is acknowledged.\n   */\n  onAnimatedZoomComplete?: () => void;\n  /**\n   * Request navigation to a specific train/date.\n   * Set to null after navigation completes.\n   */\n  navigationTarget?: NavigationTarget | null;\n  /**\n   * Called when navigation animation completes.\n   */\n  onNavigationComplete?: () => void;\n  /**\n   * Whether performance monitor panel is visible (PERF-001)\n   */\n  perfVisible?: boolean;\n  /**\n   * Current performance event type for logging context (PERF-001)\n   */\n  perfEvent?: PerfEvent;\n}\n\n// Navigation limits\nconst ABSOLUTE_MIN_ZOOM = 0.05; // Absolute minimum to prevent extreme zoom out\nconst MAX_ZOOM = 5.0;\n\n// Momentum physics constants\nconst MOMENTUM_FRICTION = 0.93; // Per-frame velocity multiplier (0.93-0.95 recommended)\nconst MOMENTUM_MIN_VELOCITY = 0.5; // Stop threshold in world units\nconst MOMENTUM_VELOCITY_SAMPLES = 5; // Number of velocity samples to average\n\n// Smooth zoom constants\nconst ZOOM_ANIMATION_DURATION = 250; // ms for animated zoom transitions\nconst _ZOOM_ACCUMULATION_TIMEOUT = 50; // ms to accumulate wheel events (trackpad smoothing)\nconst _PINCH_ZOOM_SENSITIVITY = 0.01; // Sensitivity for pinch-to-zoom\n\n// Cross-platform scroll normalization constants (F121)\n// Based on Facebook's normalizeWheel pattern and UX_RESEARCH.md\nconst LINE_HEIGHT = 40; // Pixels per line (for deltaMode === 1)\nconst PAGE_HEIGHT = 800; // Pixels per page (for deltaMode === 2)\nconst MOUSE_ZOOM_SENSITIVITY = 0.003; // Base zoom sensitivity for mouse wheel\nconst TRACKPAD_ZOOM_SENSITIVITY = 0.001; // Lower sensitivity for trackpad (many small events)\nconst MAX_ZOOM_DELTA_PER_EVENT = 0.5; // Cap zoom change per event to prevent jumps\nconst TRACKPAD_DETECTION_THRESHOLD = 20; // ms - events faster than this are trackpad\nconst TRACKPAD_EVENT_COUNT_THRESHOLD = 3; // Number of rapid events to confirm trackpad\n\n// Scroll modifier pan sensitivity (F016, F017)\n// Convert wheel delta (pixels) to camera pan (world units)\nconst SCROLL_PAN_SENSITIVITY = 1.5;\n\n// Keyboard shortcuts constants (F027, F028)\nconst KEYBOARD_ZOOM_STEP = 1.5; // Zoom multiplier per keypress (1.5x = 150%)\nconst KEYBOARD_PAN_STEP = 100; // Pixels to pan per arrow key press (in world units)\nconst KEYBOARD_PAGE_STEP = 500; // Pixels for Page Up/Down (in world units)\n\nconst { pxPerDay, pxPerTrain } = DEFAULT_VIEW_CONFIG;\n\n/**\n * Velocity sample for momentum calculation\n * (Local type - only used for velocity tracking refs, not persisted state)\n */\ninterface VelocitySample {\n  x: number;\n  y: number;\n  time: number;\n}\n\n/**\n * Local momentum animation state (includes animationId which is not in store)\n * The actual momentum velocity is managed in canvasStore.viewport.momentum\n */\ninterface LocalMomentumState {\n  animationId: number | null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Local zoom animation state (includes animationId)\n * Animation parameters are stored in canvasStore.viewport.animation\n */\ninterface LocalZoomAnimationState {\n  animationId: number | null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Pinch-to-zoom state for touch gestures\n */\ninterface PinchState {\n  active: boolean;\n  initialDistance: number;\n  initialZoom: number;\n  centerX: number;\n  centerY: number;\n  pointers: Map<number, { x: number; y: number }>;\n}\n\n/**\n * Easing functions for smooth animations\n * quadOut provides Google Maps-style smooth deceleration\n */\nconst Easing = {\n  quadOut: (t: number) => t * (2 - t),\n  cubicOut: (t: number) => 1 - Math.pow(1 - t, 3),\n};\n\n// Task block dimensions for hit testing (matching MesoLayer)\nconst TASK_HEIGHT = pxPerTrain - 4;\n\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n// KEYBOARD NAVIGATION HELPERS (F021)\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n/**\n * Get tasks visible within the current viewport\n * Sorted by train index (Y) then start day (X) for logical tab order\n */\nfunction getVisibleTasks(\n  tasks: ReturnType<typeof getRenderData>['tasks'],\n  viewportBounds: ViewportBounds\n): ReturnType<typeof getRenderData>['tasks'] {\n  const visibleTasks = tasks.filter((task) => {\n    const taskStartX = task.startDay * pxPerDay;\n    const taskEndX = taskStartX + task.duration * pxPerDay;\n    const taskY = -task.trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2;\n\n    // Check if task overlaps with viewport\n    const xOverlap = taskEndX >= viewportBounds.minX && taskStartX <= viewportBounds.maxX;\n    const yOverlap = taskY >= viewportBounds.minY - pxPerTrain && taskY <= viewportBounds.maxY + pxPerTrain;\n\n    return xOverlap && yOverlap;\n  });\n\n  // Sort by train index (row), then by start day (column) for natural reading order\n  return visibleTasks.sort((a, b) => {\n    if (a.trainIndex !== b.trainIndex) {\n      return a.trainIndex - b.trainIndex;\n    }\n    return a.startDay - b.startDay;\n  });\n}\n\n/**\n * Find next task in a specific direction from the current focused task\n * Direction: 'left' | 'right' | 'up' | 'down'\n */\nfunction findNextTaskInDirection(\n  tasks: ReturnType<typeof getRenderData>['tasks'],\n  currentTaskId: string,\n  direction: 'left' | 'right' | 'up' | 'down'\n): string | null {\n  const currentTask = tasks.find((t) => t.id === currentTaskId);\n  if (!currentTask) return null;\n\n  const currentX = currentTask.startDay * pxPerDay + (currentTask.duration * pxPerDay) / 2;\n  const currentY = -currentTask.trainIndex;\n\n  let bestMatch: typeof currentTask | null = null;\n  let bestScore = Infinity;\n\n  for (const task of tasks) {\n    if (task.id === currentTaskId) continue;\n\n    const taskX = task.startDay * pxPerDay + (task.duration * pxPerDay) / 2;\n    const taskY = -task.trainIndex;\n\n    let isInDirection = false;\n    let score = 0;\n\n    switch (direction) {\n      case 'left':\n        isInDirection = taskX < currentX;\n        if (isInDirection) {\n          // Prefer same row, then closest to the left\n          const rowPenalty = Math.abs(taskY - currentY) * 10000;\n          score = (currentX - taskX) + rowPenalty;\n        }\n        break;\n      case 'right':\n        isInDirection = taskX > currentX;\n        if (isInDirection) {\n          const rowPenalty = Math.abs(taskY - currentY) * 10000;\n          score = (taskX - currentX) + rowPenalty;\n        }\n        break;\n      case 'up':\n        isInDirection = taskY > currentY;\n        if (isInDirection) {\n          // Prefer closest row above with similar X\n          const xPenalty = Math.abs(taskX - currentX) / 100;\n          score = (taskY - currentY) + xPenalty;\n        }\n        break;\n      case 'down':\n        isInDirection = taskY < currentY;\n        if (isInDirection) {\n          const xPenalty = Math.abs(taskX - currentX) / 100;\n          score = (currentY - taskY) + xPenalty;\n        }\n        break;\n    }\n\n    if (isInDirection && score < bestScore) {\n      bestScore = score;\n      bestMatch = task;\n    }\n  }\n\n  return bestMatch?.id || null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Find task at screen position (hit testing for hover/click)\n *\n * Converts screen coordinates to world coordinates and finds\n * which task (if any) is under the cursor.\n *\n * @param screenX - Screen X coordinate (e.g., clientX)\n * @param screenY - Screen Y coordinate (e.g., clientY)\n * @param containerRect - Container element bounding rect\n * @param cameraX - Camera X position in world coordinates\n * @param cameraY - Camera Y position in world coordinates\n * @param zoom - Current zoom level\n * @param canvasWidth - Canvas width in pixels\n * @param canvasHeight - Canvas height in pixels\n * @param tasks - Array of tasks to test against\n * @returns Task ID if found, null otherwise\n */\nfunction findTaskAtPosition(\n  screenX: number,\n  screenY: number,\n  containerRect: DOMRect,\n  cameraX: number,\n  cameraY: number,\n  zoom: number,\n  canvasWidth: number,\n  canvasHeight: number,\n  tasks: ReturnType<typeof getRenderData>['tasks']\n): string | null {\n  // Convert screen coords to canvas coords (relative to container)\n  const canvasX = screenX - containerRect.left;\n  const canvasY = screenY - containerRect.top;\n\n  // Calculate half viewport in world units\n  const halfViewX = canvasWidth / 2 / zoom;\n  const halfViewY = canvasHeight / 2 / zoom;\n\n  // Convert canvas coords to world coords\n  // canvasX=0 is left edge of viewport, which is cameraX - halfViewX in world\n  // canvasY=0 is top edge of viewport, which is cameraY + halfViewY in world\n  const worldX = cameraX - halfViewX + (canvasX / zoom);\n  const worldY = cameraY + halfViewY - (canvasY / zoom);\n\n  // Find task at world position\n  for (const task of tasks) {\n    const taskStartX = task.startDay * pxPerDay;\n    const taskEndX = taskStartX + task.duration * pxPerDay;\n    const taskCenterY = -task.trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2;\n    const taskTopY = taskCenterY + TASK_HEIGHT / 2;\n    const taskBottomY = taskCenterY - TASK_HEIGHT / 2;\n\n    if (\n      worldX >= taskStartX &&\n      worldX <= taskEndX &&\n      worldY <= taskTopY &&\n      worldY >= taskBottomY\n    ) {\n      return task.id;\n    }\n  }\n\n  return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Camera controller component (inside R3F context)\n * Handles initial positioning and syncs camera with external state\n *\n * IMPORTANT: Uses R3F's `size` from useThree() which is the actual canvas size,\n * not the container div size (which can differ due to flexbox/layout).\n */\nfunction CameraController({\n  cameraX,\n  cameraY,\n  zoom,\n  worldBounds,\n  isInitialized,\n  onInitialized,\n  onViewportChange,\n}: {\n  cameraX: number;\n  cameraY: number;\n  zoom: number;\n  worldBounds: WorldBounds;\n  isInitialized: boolean;\n  onInitialized: (pos: { x: number; y: number }, size: { width: number; height: number }) => void;\n  onViewportChange?: (viewport: ViewportInfo) => void;\n}) {\n  const { camera, size } = useThree();\n\n  // Initialize camera position on first render using actual R3F size\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (isInitialized || size.width === 0 || size.height === 0) return;\n\n    const halfViewX = size.width / 2 / zoom;\n    const halfViewY = size.height / 2 / zoom;\n\n    // Position camera to show top-left corner (X=0, Y=0)\n    const initialCameraX = halfViewX;\n    const initialCameraY = -halfViewY;\n\n    // Clamp to world bounds\n    const minCameraX = worldBounds.minX + halfViewX;\n    const maxCameraX = worldBounds.maxX - halfViewX;\n    const minCameraY = worldBounds.minY + halfViewY;\n    const maxCameraY = worldBounds.maxY - halfViewY;\n\n    const clampedX = Math.max(minCameraX, Math.min(maxCameraX, initialCameraX));\n    const clampedY = Math.max(minCameraY, Math.min(maxCameraY, initialCameraY));\n\n    // Update camera\n    camera.position.x = clampedX;\n    camera.position.y = clampedY;\n    (camera as any).zoom = zoom;\n    camera.updateProjectionMatrix();\n\n    // Notify parent of initial position and actual canvas size\n    onInitialized({ x: clampedX, y: clampedY }, { width: size.width, height: size.height });\n\n    // Notify viewport change with full viewport info\n    const topY = clampedY + halfViewY;\n    const leftX = clampedX - halfViewX;\n    const rightX = clampedX + halfViewX;\n    onViewportChange?.({ topY, leftX, rightX });\n  }, [size, zoom, worldBounds, camera, isInitialized, onInitialized, onViewportChange]);\n\n  // Sync camera with external state changes (after initialization)\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!isInitialized) return;\n\n    camera.position.x = cameraX;\n    camera.position.y = cameraY;\n    (camera as any).zoom = zoom;\n    camera.updateProjectionMatrix();\n  }, [camera, cameraX, cameraY, zoom, isInitialized]);\n\n  return null;\n}\n\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n// ARIA LABELS FOR ACCESSIBILITY (F022)\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n/**\n * Human-readable LOD level names for screen reader announcements\n */\nconst LOD_LABELS: Record<LODLevel, string> = {\n  MACRO: 'Strategic view showing 10-year overview with heatmap',\n  MESO: 'Tactical view showing task blocks across trains',\n  MICRO: 'Detailed view showing individual task cards',\n};\n\n/**\n * Format zoom level for screen reader announcement\n */\nfunction formatZoomForAria(zoom: number): string {\n  const percentage = Math.round(zoom * 100);\n  return `${percentage} percent zoom`;\n}\n\nexport function InfiniteCanvas({\n  zoom,\n  lod,\n  onZoomChange,\n  onViewportChange,\n  onMinZoomChange,\n  animatedZoomTarget,\n  onAnimatedZoomComplete,\n  navigationTarget,\n  onNavigationComplete,\n  perfVisible: _perfVisible = false,\n  perfEvent = 'idle',\n}: InfiniteCanvasProps) {\n  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n  // ARIA LIVE REGION STATE (F022)\n  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n  const ariaLiveRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n  const previousLodRef = useRef<LODLevel>(lod);\n  const previousZoomRef = useRef<number>(zoom);\n  const zoomAnnouncementTimeoutRef = useRef<number | null>(null);\n\n  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n  // STATE FROM CANVAS MACHINE (replaces useState)\n  // Using useSyncExternalStore under the hood - no stale closures!\n  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n  const isInitialized = useCanvasSelector((s) => s.viewport.isInitialized);\n  const canvasSize = useCanvasSelector((s) => s.viewport.canvasSize);\n  const cameraPos = useCanvasSelector((s) => s.viewport.camera);\n  const isPanning = useCanvasSelector((s) => s.viewport.isPanning);\n  // Note: panStart, cameraPosAtPanStart, momentum read from store directly in handlers for fresh values\n  const _panStart = useCanvasSelector((s) => s.viewport.panStart);\n  const _cameraPosAtPanStart = useCanvasSelector((s) => s.viewport.cameraPosAtPanStart);\n  const _momentum = useCanvasSelector((s) => s.viewport.momentum);\n\n  // Interaction state (F018 hover, F019 selection)\n  const hoveredTaskId = useCanvasSelector((s) => s.interaction.hoveredTaskId);\n  const selectedTaskId = useCanvasSelector((s) => s.interaction.selectedTaskId);\n  const focusedTaskId = useCanvasSelector((s) => s.interaction.focusedTaskId);\n  const isHoverable = useCanvasSelector((s) => s.interaction.isHoverable);\n\n  // Get render data (memoized)\n  const { trains, tasks } = useMemo(() => getRenderData(), []);\n\n  // Build spatial index for viewport culling (PERF-002)\n  const spatialIndex = useSpatialIndex(tasks);\n\n  // Calculate world bounds (for pan clamping)\n  const worldBounds = useMemo<WorldBounds>(() => {\n    const totalDays = 365 * 10; // 10 years\n    return calculateWorldBounds(trains.length, totalDays);\n  }, [trains.length]);\n\n  /**\n   * Calculate dynamic MIN_ZOOM to prevent white space around content.\n   * MIN_ZOOM is set so the viewport never exceeds the world bounds.\n   */\n  const effectiveMinZoom = useMemo(() => {\n    if (canvasSize.width === 0 || canvasSize.height === 0) {\n      return ABSOLUTE_MIN_ZOOM;\n    }\n\n    const worldWidth = worldBounds.maxX - worldBounds.minX;\n    const worldHeight = Math.abs(worldBounds.maxY - worldBounds.minY);\n\n    // Calculate zoom levels where viewport equals world dimensions\n    // At zoom Z: viewportWidth = canvasSize.width / Z\n    // To fit world: canvasSize.width / Z = worldWidth → Z = canvasSize.width / worldWidth\n    const minZoomX = canvasSize.width / worldWidth;\n    const minZoomY = canvasSize.height / worldHeight;\n\n    // Use the maximum to ensure content fills viewport in both dimensions\n    const dynamicMin = Math.max(minZoomX, minZoomY);\n\n    // Clamp to absolute minimum (safety) and return\n    return Math.max(ABSOLUTE_MIN_ZOOM, dynamicMin);\n  }, [canvasSize.width, canvasSize.height, worldBounds]);\n\n  // Notify parent when effective min zoom changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n    onMinZoomChange?.(effectiveMinZoom);\n  }, [effectiveMinZoom, onMinZoomChange]);\n\n  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n  // ARIA ANNOUNCEMENTS (F022)\n  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n  /**\n   * Announce message to screen readers via ARIA live region\n   */\n  const announceToScreenReader = useCallback((message: string) => {\n    if (ariaLiveRef.current) {\n      // Clear and set to trigger announcement even for same message\n      ariaLiveRef.current.textContent = '';\n      // Use setTimeout to ensure the clear is processed first\n      setTimeout(() => {\n        if (ariaLiveRef.current) {\n          ariaLiveRef.current.textContent = message;\n        }\n      }, 50);\n    }\n  }, []);\n\n  // Announce LOD level changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (lod !== previousLodRef.current) {\n      previousLodRef.current = lod;\n      announceToScreenReader(`View changed to ${LOD_LABELS[lod]}`);\n    }\n  }, [lod, announceToScreenReader]);\n\n  // Announce significant zoom changes (debounced to avoid spam)\n  useEffect(() => {\n    // Only announce if zoom changed significantly (>10%)\n    const zoomDiff = Math.abs(zoom - previousZoomRef.current) / previousZoomRef.current;\n    if (zoomDiff < 0.1) return;\n\n    // Clear previous timeout\n    if (zoomAnnouncementTimeoutRef.current) {\n      clearTimeout(zoomAnnouncementTimeoutRef.current);\n    }\n\n    // Debounce zoom announcements (wait 500ms after last change)\n    zoomAnnouncementTimeoutRef.current = window.setTimeout(() => {\n      previousZoomRef.current = zoom;\n      announceToScreenReader(formatZoomForAria(zoom));\n    }, 500);\n\n    return () => {\n      if (zoomAnnouncementTimeoutRef.current) {\n        clearTimeout(zoomAnnouncementTimeoutRef.current);\n      }\n    };\n  }, [zoom, announceToScreenReader]);\n\n  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n  // LOCAL REFS (animation frame IDs, velocity samples - not state)\n  // These are not state because they don't affect rendering\n  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n  const velocitySamplesRef = useRef<VelocitySample[]>([]);\n  const momentumAnimationRef = useRef<LocalMomentumState>({\n    animationId: null,\n  });\n  const lastPointerPosRef = useRef({ x: 0, y: 0, time: 0 });\n  // Track if pointer moved significantly (to distinguish click from pan)\n  const pointerMovedRef = useRef(false);\n  const pointerDownPosRef = useRef({ x: 0, y: 0 });\n\n  // Smooth zoom animation state - only the animationId is local\n  // Animation parameters are now in canvasStore.viewport.animation\n  const zoomAnimationRef = useRef<LocalZoomAnimationState>({\n    animationId: null,\n  });\n\n  // Wheel event accumulation for trackpad smooth zoom + input detection (F121)\n  const wheelAccumulatorRef = useRef({\n    delta: 0,\n    cursorX: 0,\n    cursorY: 0,\n    timeout: null as ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null,\n    // Trackpad detection state\n    lastEventTime: 0,\n    rapidEventCount: 0,\n    isTrackpad: false,\n  });\n\n  // Pinch-to-zoom state\n  const pinchRef = useRef<PinchState>({\n    active: false,\n    initialDistance: 0,\n    initialZoom: 1,\n    centerX: 0,\n    centerY: 0,\n    pointers: new Map(),\n  });\n\n  /**\n   * Update camera position in the canvas store\n   * Using external store means no stale closures - getState() always returns current value\n   */\n  const updateCameraPos = useCallback((pos: { x: number; y: number }) => {\n    canvasStore.dispatch(canvasActions.viewport.setCamera(pos));\n  }, []);\n\n  /**\n   * Called by CameraController when it initializes with actual R3F canvas size\n   */\n  const handleCameraInitialized = useCallback(\n    (pos: { x: number; y: number }, size: { width: number; height: number }) => {\n      canvasStore.dispatch(\n        canvasActions.viewport.initialize({ camera: pos, canvasSize: size })\n      );\n    },\n    []\n  );\n\n  /**\n   * Calculate and notify the viewport position (topY, leftX, rightX)\n   */\n  const notifyViewportChange = useCallback(\n    (camX: number, camY: number, currentZoom: number) => {\n      const halfViewX = canvasSize.width / 2 / currentZoom;\n      const halfViewY = canvasSize.height / 2 / currentZoom;\n      const topY = camY + halfViewY;\n      const leftX = camX - halfViewX;\n      const rightX = camX + halfViewX;\n      onViewportChange?.({ topY, leftX, rightX });\n    },\n    [canvasSize.width, canvasSize.height, onViewportChange]\n  );\n\n  /**\n   * Calculate viewport bounds for frustum culling\n   * This determines which tasks are visible and need to be rendered\n   * IMPORTANT: Must be defined before handleKeyDown which uses it for F021\n   */\n  const viewportBounds = useMemo<ViewportBounds>(() => {\n    const halfViewX = canvasSize.width / 2 / zoom;\n    const halfViewY = canvasSize.height / 2 / zoom;\n\n    return {\n      minX: cameraPos.x - halfViewX,\n      maxX: cameraPos.x + halfViewX,\n      minY: cameraPos.y - halfViewY,\n      maxY: cameraPos.y + halfViewY,\n    };\n  }, [cameraPos.x, cameraPos.y, canvasSize.width, canvasSize.height, zoom]);\n\n  /**\n   * Clamp camera position to world bounds\n   */\n  const clampCameraToWorld = useCallback(\n    (x: number, y: number, currentZoom: number): { x: number; y: number } => {\n      const halfViewX = canvasSize.width / 2 / currentZoom;\n      const halfViewY = canvasSize.height / 2 / currentZoom;\n\n      const minCameraX = worldBounds.minX + halfViewX;\n      const maxCameraX = worldBounds.maxX - halfViewX;\n      const minCameraY = worldBounds.minY + halfViewY;\n      const maxCameraY = worldBounds.maxY - halfViewY;\n\n      const clampedX =\n        maxCameraX < minCameraX\n          ? (worldBounds.minX + worldBounds.maxX) / 2\n          : Math.max(minCameraX, Math.min(maxCameraX, x));\n\n      const clampedY =\n        maxCameraY < minCameraY\n          ? (worldBounds.minY + worldBounds.maxY) / 2\n          : Math.max(minCameraY, Math.min(maxCameraY, y));\n\n      return { x: clampedX, y: clampedY };\n    },\n    [canvasSize, worldBounds]\n  );\n\n  /**\n   * Stop any active momentum animation\n   */\n  const stopMomentum = useCallback(() => {\n    if (momentumAnimationRef.current.animationId) {\n      cancelAnimationFrame(momentumAnimationRef.current.animationId);\n      momentumAnimationRef.current.animationId = null;\n    }\n    // TECH-DEBT-002: @zazcart/tools action creators expect payload even when reducer doesn't need one\n    canvasStore.dispatch((canvasActions.viewport.stopMomentum as any)());\n    velocitySamplesRef.current = [];\n  }, []);\n\n  /**\n   * Stop any active zoom animation\n   */\n  const stopZoomAnimation = useCallback(() => {\n    if (zoomAnimationRef.current.animationId) {\n      cancelAnimationFrame(zoomAnimationRef.current.animationId);\n      zoomAnimationRef.current.animationId = null;\n    }\n    // Clear wheel accumulator\n    if (wheelAccumulatorRef.current.timeout) {\n      clearTimeout(wheelAccumulatorRef.current.timeout);\n      wheelAccumulatorRef.current.timeout = null;\n    }\n    wheelAccumulatorRef.current.delta = 0;\n  }, []);\n\n  /**\n   * Animate zoom smoothly from current to target\n   * Uses quadratic easing for Google Maps-like feel\n   *\n   * Now uses canvasStore for animation state - no stale closures in the animation loop\n   */\n  const animateZoomTo = useCallback(\n    (\n      targetZoom: number,\n      targetCameraX: number,\n      targetCameraY: number,\n      duration: number = ZOOM_ANIMATION_DURATION\n    ) => {\n      // Stop any existing animation\n      stopZoomAnimation();\n\n      // Get current state from store (always fresh)\n      const currentState = canvasStore.getState();\n      const currentCamera = currentState.viewport.camera;\n\n      // Start animation in store\n      canvasStore.dispatch(\n        canvasActions.viewport.startAnimation({\n          startX: currentCamera.x,\n          startY: currentCamera.y,\n          startZoom: zoom,\n          targetX: targetCameraX,\n          targetY: targetCameraY,\n          targetZoom: targetZoom,\n          duration: duration,\n        })\n      );\n\n      const animate = () => {\n        // Read animation state from store (always current, no stale closures)\n        const state = canvasStore.getState();\n        const anim = state.viewport.animation;\n\n        if (!anim.isAnimating) {\n          zoomAnimationRef.current.animationId = null;\n          return;\n        }\n\n        const elapsed = Date.now() - anim.startTime;\n        const progress = Math.min(elapsed / anim.duration, 1);\n        const easedProgress = Easing.quadOut(progress);\n\n        const currentZoom = anim.startZoom + (anim.targetZoom - anim.startZoom) * easedProgress;\n        const currentCameraX = anim.startX + (anim.targetX - anim.startX) * easedProgress;\n        const currentCameraY = anim.startY + (anim.targetY - anim.startY) * easedProgress;\n\n        // Clamp camera position\n        const clamped = clampCameraToWorld(currentCameraX, currentCameraY, currentZoom);\n\n        // Update store with new camera position\n        canvasStore.dispatch(\n          canvasActions.viewport.updateAnimation({ camera: clamped })\n        );\n        onZoomChange(currentZoom);\n        notifyViewportChange(clamped.x, clamped.y, currentZoom);\n\n        if (progress < 1) {\n          zoomAnimationRef.current.animationId = requestAnimationFrame(animate);\n        } else {\n          // TECH-DEBT-002: @zazcart/tools action creators expect payload even when reducer doesn't need one\n          canvasStore.dispatch((canvasActions.viewport.stopAnimation as any)());\n          zoomAnimationRef.current.animationId = null;\n        }\n      };\n\n      zoomAnimationRef.current.animationId = requestAnimationFrame(animate);\n    },\n    [zoom, clampCameraToWorld, onZoomChange, notifyViewportChange, stopZoomAnimation]\n  );\n\n  /**\n   * Calculate average velocity from samples\n   * Samples contain individual deltas (movement per event), not absolute positions\n   */\n  const calculateAverageVelocity = useCallback(() => {\n    const samples = velocitySamplesRef.current;\n    if (samples.length < 2) return { vx: 0, vy: 0 };\n\n    // Use only recent samples (last N samples)\n    const recentSamples = samples.slice(-MOMENTUM_VELOCITY_SAMPLES);\n    if (recentSamples.length < 2) return { vx: 0, vy: 0 };\n\n    // Calculate total displacement and time\n    const first = recentSamples[0];\n    const last = recentSamples[recentSamples.length - 1];\n    const dt = last.time - first.time;\n\n    if (dt <= 0) return { vx: 0, vy: 0 };\n\n    // Sum all deltas to get total displacement\n    let totalDx = 0;\n    let totalDy = 0;\n    for (const sample of recentSamples) {\n      totalDx += sample.x;\n      totalDy += sample.y;\n    }\n\n    // Velocity in world units per millisecond\n    const vx = totalDx / dt;\n    const vy = totalDy / dt;\n\n    return { vx, vy };\n  }, []);\n\n  /**\n   * Start momentum animation after drag release\n   *\n   * Now uses canvasStore for momentum state - no stale closures in the animation loop\n   */\n  const startMomentum = useCallback(\n    (vx: number, vy: number) => {\n      // Convert velocity from world/ms to world/frame (at 60fps, ~16.67ms per frame)\n      const frameTime = 16.67;\n      const velocityX = vx * frameTime;\n      const velocityY = vy * frameTime;\n\n      // Start momentum in store\n      canvasStore.dispatch(\n        canvasActions.viewport.startMomentum({ velocityX, velocityY })\n      );\n\n      // Clear samples\n      velocitySamplesRef.current = [];\n\n      const animate = () => {\n        // Read momentum state from store (always current, no stale closures)\n        const state = canvasStore.getState();\n        const mom = state.viewport.momentum;\n\n        if (!mom.isActive) {\n          momentumAnimationRef.current.animationId = null;\n          return;\n        }\n\n        // Check if velocity is negligible\n        const speed = Math.sqrt(mom.velocityX ** 2 + mom.velocityY ** 2);\n        if (speed < MOMENTUM_MIN_VELOCITY) {\n          // TECH-DEBT-002: @zazcart/tools action creators expect payload even when reducer doesn't need one\n          canvasStore.dispatch((canvasActions.viewport.stopMomentum as any)());\n          momentumAnimationRef.current.animationId = null;\n          return;\n        }\n\n        // Apply velocity to camera position\n        // Using store.getState() - no stale closures!\n        const prevPos = state.viewport.camera;\n        const newX = prevPos.x + mom.velocityX;\n        const newY = prevPos.y - mom.velocityY; // Inverted for camera Y\n        const clamped = clampCameraToWorld(newX, newY, zoom);\n\n        // Update store with new position and apply friction\n        canvasStore.dispatch(\n          canvasActions.viewport.updateMomentum({\n            velocityX: mom.velocityX * MOMENTUM_FRICTION,\n            velocityY: mom.velocityY * MOMENTUM_FRICTION,\n            camera: clamped,\n          })\n        );\n        notifyViewportChange(clamped.x, clamped.y, zoom);\n\n        // Continue animation\n        momentumAnimationRef.current.animationId = requestAnimationFrame(animate);\n      };\n\n      // Start animation\n      momentumAnimationRef.current.animationId = requestAnimationFrame(animate);\n    },\n    [clampCameraToWorld, notifyViewportChange, zoom]\n  );\n\n  /**\n   * Calculate target camera position for zoom toward a point\n   * Note: Currently unused but kept for future zoom enhancements\n   */\n  const _calculateZoomTowardPoint = useCallback(\n    (cursorX: number, cursorY: number, fromZoom: number, toZoom: number) => {\n      // Convert cursor to world coordinates (before zoom)\n      const worldX = cursorX / fromZoom + cameraPos.x;\n      const worldY = -cursorY / fromZoom + cameraPos.y;\n\n      // Calculate new camera position to keep cursor point fixed\n      const newCameraX = worldX - cursorX / toZoom;\n      const newCameraY = worldY + cursorY / toZoom;\n\n      return clampCameraToWorld(newCameraX, newCameraY, toZoom);\n    },\n    [cameraPos, clampCameraToWorld]\n  );\n\n  /**\n   * Execute accumulated zoom with smooth animation\n   * Called after wheel events are accumulated (for trackpad smoothing)\n   * With cross-platform normalized delta (F121)\n   *\n   * Note: Currently unused but kept for future trackpad smoothing implementation\n   * Now uses canvasStore to get current animation state\n   */\n  const _executeAccumulatedZoom = useCallback(() => {\n    const accumulator = wheelAccumulatorRef.current;\n    if (Math.abs(accumulator.delta) < 0.001) {\n      accumulator.delta = 0;\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const rect = containerRef.current?.getBoundingClientRect();\n    if (!rect) return;\n\n    // Get current state from store (always fresh)\n    const state = canvasStore.getState();\n    const anim = state.viewport.animation;\n\n    // Get the current zoom (may be in animation)\n    const currentZoom = anim.isAnimating ? anim.targetZoom : zoom;\n\n    // Calculate zoom factor from accumulated normalized delta (F121)\n    // Normalized delta is already scaled by sensitivity, use exponential zoom\n    // Negative delta = zoom in, positive delta = zoom out\n    const zoomFactor = Math.exp(-accumulator.delta);\n    const newZoom = Math.max(effectiveMinZoom, Math.min(MAX_ZOOM, currentZoom * zoomFactor));\n\n    if (Math.abs(newZoom - currentZoom) < 0.001) {\n      accumulator.delta = 0;\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Cursor position relative to canvas center\n    const cursorX = accumulator.cursorX - rect.left - rect.width / 2;\n    const cursorY = accumulator.cursorY - rect.top - rect.height / 2;\n\n    // Get current camera position (may be in animation)\n    const currentCameraX = anim.isAnimating ? anim.targetX : state.viewport.camera.x;\n    const currentCameraY = anim.isAnimating ? anim.targetY : state.viewport.camera.y;\n\n    // Calculate target camera position\n    const worldX = cursorX / currentZoom + currentCameraX;\n    const worldY = -cursorY / currentZoom + currentCameraY;\n    const newCameraX = worldX - cursorX / newZoom;\n    const newCameraY = worldY + cursorY / newZoom;\n    const clamped = clampCameraToWorld(newCameraX, newCameraY, newZoom);\n\n    // Reset accumulator\n    accumulator.delta = 0;\n    accumulator.timeout = null;\n\n    // Animate to new zoom\n    animateZoomTo(newZoom, clamped.x, clamped.y, ZOOM_ANIMATION_DURATION);\n  }, [zoom, effectiveMinZoom, clampCameraToWorld, animateZoomTo]);\n\n  /**\n   * Normalize wheel delta for cross-platform consistency (F121)\n   * Handles deltaMode (LINE/PAGE), detects trackpad vs mouse\n   * Returns normalized pixel delta\n   */\n  const normalizeWheelDelta = useCallback((e: WheelEvent): number => {\n    let delta = e.deltaY;\n\n    // Normalize deltaMode to pixels (F121: cross-platform normalization)\n    // deltaMode 0 = PIXEL, 1 = LINE, 2 = PAGE\n    if (e.deltaMode === 1) {\n      // LINE mode (Firefox on Windows)\n      delta *= LINE_HEIGHT;\n    } else if (e.deltaMode === 2) {\n      // PAGE mode (rare, but handle it)\n      delta *= PAGE_HEIGHT;\n    }\n\n    // Detect trackpad vs mouse by event frequency\n    const accumulator = wheelAccumulatorRef.current;\n    const now = performance.now();\n    const timeSinceLastEvent = now - accumulator.lastEventTime;\n\n    if (timeSinceLastEvent < TRACKPAD_DETECTION_THRESHOLD) {\n      accumulator.rapidEventCount++;\n      if (accumulator.rapidEventCount >= TRACKPAD_EVENT_COUNT_THRESHOLD) {\n        accumulator.isTrackpad = true;\n      }\n    } else {\n      // Reset detection if events are spaced out (mouse behavior)\n      accumulator.rapidEventCount = 1;\n      // Also check delta magnitude - trackpads produce small deltas\n      if (Math.abs(delta) > 50 && e.deltaMode === 0) {\n        accumulator.isTrackpad = false;\n      }\n    }\n    accumulator.lastEventTime = now;\n\n    // Apply sensitivity based on input type\n    const sensitivity = accumulator.isTrackpad\n      ? TRACKPAD_ZOOM_SENSITIVITY\n      : MOUSE_ZOOM_SENSITIVITY;\n\n    // Apply sensitivity and clamp to prevent jumps\n    const normalizedDelta = delta * sensitivity;\n    return Math.max(-MAX_ZOOM_DELTA_PER_EVENT, Math.min(MAX_ZOOM_DELTA_PER_EVENT, normalizedDelta));\n  }, []);\n\n/**\n   * Handle wheel events - Google Maps-like behavior (BUG-003)\n   *\n   * Behavior:\n   * - No modifier (2-finger scroll): Pan in both directions (deltaX → horizontal, deltaY → vertical)\n   * - Ctrl+scroll (pinch gesture): Zoom toward cursor position\n   *\n   * This follows Google Maps UX pattern where:\n   * - Trackpad 2-finger drag pans the map\n   * - Trackpad pinch (sends ctrlKey=true) zooms\n   * - Mouse Ctrl+scroll zooms\n   *\n   * With cross-platform normalization (F121)\n   */\n  const handleWheel = useCallback(\n    (e: WheelEvent) => {\n      e.preventDefault();\n      if (!isInitialized) return;\n\n      // Stop momentum on any wheel interaction\n      stopMomentum();\n\n      const rect = containerRef.current?.getBoundingClientRect();\n      if (!rect) return;\n\n      // Normalize deltas for cross-platform consistency\n      const getNormalizedDeltas = () => {\n        let deltaX = e.deltaX;\n        let deltaY = e.deltaY;\n        if (e.deltaMode === 1) {\n          deltaX *= LINE_HEIGHT;\n          deltaY *= LINE_HEIGHT;\n        } else if (e.deltaMode === 2) {\n          deltaX *= PAGE_HEIGHT;\n          deltaY *= PAGE_HEIGHT;\n        }\n        return { deltaX, deltaY };\n      };\n\n      // Ctrl+scroll = ZOOM (pinch gesture on trackpad sends ctrlKey=true)\n      // BUG-009: Apply zoom DIRECTLY for trackpad pinch (no animation delay)\n      // This eliminates the 50ms accumulation + 250ms animation lag for responsive feel\n      if (e.ctrlKey) {\n        // Normalize delta for cross-platform consistency (F121)\n        const normalizedDelta = normalizeWheelDelta(e);\n\n        // Skip if delta is too small\n        if (Math.abs(normalizedDelta) < 0.001) return;\n\n        // Calculate zoom factor from normalized delta\n        // Negative delta = zoom in, positive delta = zoom out\n        const zoomFactor = Math.exp(-normalizedDelta);\n        const newZoom = Math.max(effectiveMinZoom, Math.min(MAX_ZOOM, zoom * zoomFactor));\n\n        // Skip if zoom change is negligible\n        if (Math.abs(newZoom - zoom) < 0.001) return;\n\n        // Cursor position relative to canvas center\n        const cursorX = e.clientX - rect.left - rect.width / 2;\n        const cursorY = e.clientY - rect.top - rect.height / 2;\n\n        // Get current camera position\n        const currentCamera = canvasStore.getState().viewport.camera;\n\n        // Calculate new camera position to keep cursor point fixed in world space\n        const worldX = cursorX / zoom + currentCamera.x;\n        const worldY = -cursorY / zoom + currentCamera.y;\n        const newCameraX = worldX - cursorX / newZoom;\n        const newCameraY = worldY + cursorY / newZoom;\n        const clamped = clampCameraToWorld(newCameraX, newCameraY, newZoom);\n\n        // Apply directly (no animation) - same as handlePinchZoom for responsive feel\n        updateCameraPos(clamped);\n        onZoomChange(newZoom);\n        notifyViewportChange(clamped.x, clamped.y, newZoom);\n        return;\n      }\n\n      // Default behavior: PAN in both directions (Google Maps style)\n      // 2-finger trackpad scroll sends both deltaX and deltaY\n      const { deltaX, deltaY } = getNormalizedDeltas();\n\n      // Apply pan sensitivity (scaled by zoom for consistent world movement)\n      const panDeltaX = (deltaX * SCROLL_PAN_SENSITIVITY) / zoom;\n      const panDeltaY = (deltaY * SCROLL_PAN_SENSITIVITY) / zoom;\n\n      const currentCamera = canvasStore.getState().viewport.camera;\n      const newX = currentCamera.x + panDeltaX;\n      const newY = currentCamera.y - panDeltaY; // Negative because Y is inverted in canvas coords\n      const clamped = clampCameraToWorld(newX, newY, zoom);\n\n      updateCameraPos(clamped);\n      notifyViewportChange(clamped.x, clamped.y, zoom);\n    },\n    [isInitialized, stopMomentum, normalizeWheelDelta, effectiveMinZoom, zoom, clampCameraToWorld, updateCameraPos, onZoomChange, notifyViewportChange]\n  );\n\n  /**\n   * Handle pinch-to-zoom for touch devices\n   */\n  const handlePinchZoom = useCallback(\n    (scale: number, centerX: number, centerY: number) => {\n      const pinch = pinchRef.current;\n      const newZoom = Math.max(effectiveMinZoom, Math.min(MAX_ZOOM, pinch.initialZoom * scale));\n\n      const rect = containerRef.current?.getBoundingClientRect();\n      if (!rect) return;\n\n      // Center position relative to canvas center\n      const cursorX = centerX - rect.left - rect.width / 2;\n      const cursorY = centerY - rect.top - rect.height / 2;\n\n      // Calculate camera position to keep pinch center fixed\n      const worldX = cursorX / pinch.initialZoom + pinch.centerX;\n      const worldY = -cursorY / pinch.initialZoom + pinch.centerY;\n      const newCameraX = worldX - cursorX / newZoom;\n      const newCameraY = worldY + cursorY / newZoom;\n\n      const clamped = clampCameraToWorld(newCameraX, newCameraY, newZoom);\n\n      updateCameraPos(clamped);\n      onZoomChange(newZoom);\n      notifyViewportChange(clamped.x, clamped.y, newZoom);\n    },\n    [effectiveMinZoom, clampCameraToWorld, updateCameraPos, onZoomChange, notifyViewportChange]\n  );\n\n  // Register wheel event with { passive: false } to allow preventDefault\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const container = containerRef.current;\n    if (!container) return;\n\n    container.addEventListener('wheel', handleWheel, { passive: false });\n    return () => container.removeEventListener('wheel', handleWheel);\n  }, [handleWheel]);\n\n  /**\n   * Handle keyboard shortcuts (F027 + F028 + F021)\n   *\n   * F027 - Zoom shortcuts:\n   * - Plus/Equals (+/=): Zoom in 1.5x\n   * - Minus (-): Zoom out 1.5x\n   * - Zero (0): Reset zoom to 1.0x\n   *\n   * F028 - Pan shortcuts:\n   * - Arrow keys: Pan in direction (100px per press) when no task focused\n   * - Page Up/Down: Pan vertically (500px per press)\n   * - Home: Go to start (X=0)\n   * - End: Go to end (X=max)\n   *\n   * F021 - Task navigation:\n   * - Tab: Focus first/next visible task\n   * - Shift+Tab: Focus previous task\n   * - Enter/Space: Select focused task\n   * - Arrow keys (when task focused): Navigate between tasks\n   * - Escape: Clear focus\n   */\n  const handleKeyDown = useCallback(\n    (e: KeyboardEvent) => {\n      if (!isInitialized) return;\n\n      // Ignore if user is typing in an input/textarea\n      const target = e.target as HTMLElement;\n      if (target.tagName === 'INPUT' || target.tagName === 'TEXTAREA' || target.isContentEditable) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const state = canvasStore.getState();\n      const currentCamera = state.viewport.camera;\n      const currentFocusedTaskId = state.interaction.focusedTaskId;\n\n      // F021: Escape clears focus\n      if (e.key === 'Escape') {\n        e.preventDefault();\n        if (currentFocusedTaskId) {\n          // TECH-DEBT-002: @zazcart/tools action creators expect payload even when reducer doesn't need one\n          canvasStore.dispatch((canvasActions.interaction.clearFocus as any)());\n        }\n        return;\n      }\n\n      // F021: Enter/Space selects focused task\n      if ((e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') && currentFocusedTaskId) {\n        e.preventDefault();\n        canvasStore.dispatch(canvasActions.interaction.setSelectedTask(currentFocusedTaskId));\n        return;\n      }\n\n      // F021: Tab / Shift+Tab for task navigation\n      if (e.key === 'Tab') {\n        e.preventDefault();\n\n        // Get visible tasks sorted by position\n        const visibleTasks = getVisibleTasks(tasks, viewportBounds);\n        if (visibleTasks.length === 0) return;\n\n        let nextTaskId: string | null = null;\n\n        if (e.shiftKey) {\n          // Shift+Tab: Move to previous task\n          if (currentFocusedTaskId) {\n            const currentIndex = visibleTasks.findIndex((t) => t.id === currentFocusedTaskId);\n            if (currentIndex > 0) {\n              nextTaskId = visibleTasks[currentIndex - 1].id;\n            } else {\n              // Wrap to last visible task\n              nextTaskId = visibleTasks[visibleTasks.length - 1].id;\n            }\n          } else {\n            // No focus: start from last visible task\n            nextTaskId = visibleTasks[visibleTasks.length - 1].id;\n          }\n        } else {\n          // Tab: Move to next task\n          if (currentFocusedTaskId) {\n            const currentIndex = visibleTasks.findIndex((t) => t.id === currentFocusedTaskId);\n            if (currentIndex >= 0 && currentIndex < visibleTasks.length - 1) {\n              nextTaskId = visibleTasks[currentIndex + 1].id;\n            } else {\n              // Wrap to first visible task\n              nextTaskId = visibleTasks[0].id;\n            }\n          } else {\n            // No focus: start from first visible task\n            nextTaskId = visibleTasks[0].id;\n          }\n        }\n\n        if (nextTaskId) {\n          canvasStore.dispatch(canvasActions.interaction.setFocusedTask(nextTaskId));\n        }\n        return;\n      }\n\n      // F027: Zoom shortcuts\n      if (e.key === '+' || e.key === '=' || e.key === 'Equal') {\n        // Zoom in\n        e.preventDefault();\n        stopMomentum();\n        stopZoomAnimation();\n        const targetZoom = Math.min(zoom * KEYBOARD_ZOOM_STEP, MAX_ZOOM);\n        const clamped = clampCameraToWorld(currentCamera.x, currentCamera.y, targetZoom);\n        animateZoomTo(targetZoom, clamped.x, clamped.y, ZOOM_ANIMATION_DURATION);\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (e.key === '-' || e.key === 'Minus') {\n        // Zoom out\n        e.preventDefault();\n        stopMomentum();\n        stopZoomAnimation();\n        const targetZoom = Math.max(zoom / KEYBOARD_ZOOM_STEP, effectiveMinZoom);\n        const clamped = clampCameraToWorld(currentCamera.x, currentCamera.y, targetZoom);\n        animateZoomTo(targetZoom, clamped.x, clamped.y, ZOOM_ANIMATION_DURATION);\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (e.key === '0') {\n        // Reset zoom to 1.0x\n        e.preventDefault();\n        stopMomentum();\n        stopZoomAnimation();\n        const targetZoom = Math.max(1.0, effectiveMinZoom);\n        const clamped = clampCameraToWorld(currentCamera.x, currentCamera.y, targetZoom);\n        animateZoomTo(targetZoom, clamped.x, clamped.y, ZOOM_ANIMATION_DURATION);\n        return;\n      }\n\n      // F028/F021: Arrow keys - navigate tasks if focused, pan otherwise\n      const panStep = KEYBOARD_PAN_STEP / zoom; // Adjust for zoom level\n      const pageStep = KEYBOARD_PAGE_STEP / zoom;\n\n      if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') {\n        e.preventDefault();\n        // F021: If task focused, navigate to task on left\n        if (currentFocusedTaskId) {\n          const nextTaskId = findNextTaskInDirection(tasks, currentFocusedTaskId, 'left');\n          if (nextTaskId) {\n            canvasStore.dispatch(canvasActions.interaction.setFocusedTask(nextTaskId));\n          }\n        } else {\n          // F028: Pan left\n          stopMomentum();\n          const newX = currentCamera.x - panStep;\n          const clamped = clampCameraToWorld(newX, currentCamera.y, zoom);\n          updateCameraPos(clamped);\n          notifyViewportChange(clamped.x, clamped.y, zoom);\n        }\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') {\n        e.preventDefault();\n        // F021: If task focused, navigate to task on right\n        if (currentFocusedTaskId) {\n          const nextTaskId = findNextTaskInDirection(tasks, currentFocusedTaskId, 'right');\n          if (nextTaskId) {\n            canvasStore.dispatch(canvasActions.interaction.setFocusedTask(nextTaskId));\n          }\n        } else {\n          // F028: Pan right\n          stopMomentum();\n          const newX = currentCamera.x + panStep;\n          const clamped = clampCameraToWorld(newX, currentCamera.y, zoom);\n          updateCameraPos(clamped);\n          notifyViewportChange(clamped.x, clamped.y, zoom);\n        }\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') {\n        e.preventDefault();\n        // F021: If task focused, navigate to task above\n        if (currentFocusedTaskId) {\n          const nextTaskId = findNextTaskInDirection(tasks, currentFocusedTaskId, 'up');\n          if (nextTaskId) {\n            canvasStore.dispatch(canvasActions.interaction.setFocusedTask(nextTaskId));\n          }\n        } else {\n          // F028: Pan up\n          stopMomentum();\n          const newY = currentCamera.y + panStep;\n          const clamped = clampCameraToWorld(currentCamera.x, newY, zoom);\n          updateCameraPos(clamped);\n          notifyViewportChange(clamped.x, clamped.y, zoom);\n        }\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') {\n        e.preventDefault();\n        // F021: If task focused, navigate to task below\n        if (currentFocusedTaskId) {\n          const nextTaskId = findNextTaskInDirection(tasks, currentFocusedTaskId, 'down');\n          if (nextTaskId) {\n            canvasStore.dispatch(canvasActions.interaction.setFocusedTask(nextTaskId));\n          }\n        } else {\n          // F028: Pan down\n          stopMomentum();\n          const newY = currentCamera.y - panStep;\n          const clamped = clampCameraToWorld(currentCamera.x, newY, zoom);\n          updateCameraPos(clamped);\n          notifyViewportChange(clamped.x, clamped.y, zoom);\n        }\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (e.key === 'PageUp') {\n        e.preventDefault();\n        stopMomentum();\n        const newY = currentCamera.y + pageStep;\n        const clamped = clampCameraToWorld(currentCamera.x, newY, zoom);\n        updateCameraPos(clamped);\n        notifyViewportChange(clamped.x, clamped.y, zoom);\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (e.key === 'PageDown') {\n        e.preventDefault();\n        stopMomentum();\n        const newY = currentCamera.y - pageStep;\n        const clamped = clampCameraToWorld(currentCamera.x, newY, zoom);\n        updateCameraPos(clamped);\n        notifyViewportChange(clamped.x, clamped.y, zoom);\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (e.key === 'Home') {\n        // Go to start (X=0)\n        e.preventDefault();\n        stopMomentum();\n        stopZoomAnimation();\n        const halfViewX = canvasSize.width / 2 / zoom;\n        const targetX = worldBounds.minX + halfViewX;\n        const clamped = clampCameraToWorld(targetX, currentCamera.y, zoom);\n        animateZoomTo(zoom, clamped.x, clamped.y, 350);\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (e.key === 'End') {\n        // Go to end (X=max)\n        e.preventDefault();\n        stopMomentum();\n        stopZoomAnimation();\n        const halfViewX = canvasSize.width / 2 / zoom;\n        const targetX = worldBounds.maxX - halfViewX;\n        const clamped = clampCameraToWorld(targetX, currentCamera.y, zoom);\n        animateZoomTo(zoom, clamped.x, clamped.y, 350);\n        return;\n      }\n    },\n    [\n      isInitialized,\n      zoom,\n      effectiveMinZoom,\n      canvasSize.width,\n      worldBounds,\n      viewportBounds,\n      tasks,\n      clampCameraToWorld,\n      animateZoomTo,\n      updateCameraPos,\n      notifyViewportChange,\n      stopMomentum,\n      stopZoomAnimation,\n    ]\n  );\n\n  // Register keyboard event listener (F027 + F028)\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const container = containerRef.current;\n    if (!container) return;\n\n    // Make container focusable so it can receive keyboard events\n    container.setAttribute('tabindex', '0');\n\n    container.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);\n    return () => {\n      container.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);\n    };\n  }, [handleKeyDown]);\n\n  // Cleanup animations on unmount\n  useEffect(() => {\n    return () => {\n      if (momentumAnimationRef.current.animationId) {\n        cancelAnimationFrame(momentumAnimationRef.current.animationId);\n      }\n      if (zoomAnimationRef.current.animationId) {\n        cancelAnimationFrame(zoomAnimationRef.current.animationId);\n      }\n      if (wheelAccumulatorRef.current.timeout) {\n        clearTimeout(wheelAccumulatorRef.current.timeout);\n      }\n    };\n  }, []);\n\n  // Handle animated zoom requests from parent (button +/-)\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (animatedZoomTarget == null || !isInitialized) return;\n\n    // Calculate new camera position (zoom toward center of viewport)\n    const targetZoom = Math.max(effectiveMinZoom, Math.min(MAX_ZOOM, animatedZoomTarget));\n    if (Math.abs(targetZoom - zoom) < 0.001) {\n      onAnimatedZoomComplete?.();\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Zoom toward center (no cursor offset)\n    const clamped = clampCameraToWorld(cameraPos.x, cameraPos.y, targetZoom);\n    animateZoomTo(targetZoom, clamped.x, clamped.y, ZOOM_ANIMATION_DURATION);\n\n    // Acknowledge the request\n    onAnimatedZoomComplete?.();\n  }, [animatedZoomTarget, isInitialized, zoom, effectiveMinZoom, cameraPos, clampCameraToWorld, animateZoomTo, onAnimatedZoomComplete]);\n\n  // Handle navigation requests from parent (F124: sidebar/timeline navigation)\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (navigationTarget == null || !isInitialized) return;\n\n    // Stop any active animations\n    stopMomentum();\n    stopZoomAnimation();\n\n    // Calculate target camera position from trainIndex and/or dayOffset\n    // trainIndex → Y position: trainIndex * pxPerTrain (negative because Y goes down)\n    // dayOffset → X position: dayOffset * pxPerDay\n    let targetCameraX = cameraPos.x;\n    let targetCameraY = cameraPos.y;\n    const targetZoom = navigationTarget.zoom != null\n      ? Math.max(effectiveMinZoom, Math.min(MAX_ZOOM, navigationTarget.zoom))\n      : zoom;\n\n    if (navigationTarget.trainIndex != null) {\n      // Center on the train row\n      // Camera Y should be positioned so the train is in the center of viewport\n      // Train position in world: -trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2\n      targetCameraY = -navigationTarget.trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2;\n    }\n\n    if (navigationTarget.dayOffset != null) {\n      // Center on the date\n      // Day position in world: dayOffset * pxPerDay\n      targetCameraX = navigationTarget.dayOffset * pxPerDay;\n    }\n\n    // Clamp to world bounds\n    const clamped = clampCameraToWorld(targetCameraX, targetCameraY, targetZoom);\n\n    // Animate to target position\n    animateZoomTo(targetZoom, clamped.x, clamped.y, 350); // 350ms for navigation\n\n    // Acknowledge the request\n    onNavigationComplete?.();\n  }, [navigationTarget, isInitialized, zoom, effectiveMinZoom, cameraPos, clampCameraToWorld, animateZoomTo, stopMomentum, stopZoomAnimation, onNavigationComplete]);\n\n  /**\n   * Handle pan start / pinch start\n   *\n   * Now uses canvasStore to get camera position - no stale closures\n   */\n  const handlePointerDown = useCallback(\n    (e: React.PointerEvent) => {\n      if (!isInitialized) return;\n\n      const pinch = pinchRef.current;\n\n      // Track pointer for pinch detection\n      pinch.pointers.set(e.pointerId, { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY });\n\n      // Check for pinch gesture (2 pointers)\n      if (pinch.pointers.size === 2) {\n        // Stop pan and momentum when pinch starts\n        stopMomentum();\n        stopZoomAnimation();\n        // TECH-DEBT-002: @zazcart/tools action creators expect payload even when reducer doesn't need one\n        canvasStore.dispatch((canvasActions.viewport.endPan as any)());\n\n        const pointers = Array.from(pinch.pointers.values());\n        const dx = pointers[0].x - pointers[1].x;\n        const dy = pointers[0].y - pointers[1].y;\n        pinch.initialDistance = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);\n        pinch.initialZoom = zoom;\n        // Get camera position from store (always current, no stale closures)\n        const currentCamera = canvasStore.getState().viewport.camera;\n        pinch.centerX = currentCamera.x;\n        pinch.centerY = currentCamera.y;\n        pinch.active = true;\n        return;\n      }\n\n      // Single pointer = pan\n      if (pinch.pointers.size === 1) {\n        // Stop any active momentum and zoom animation\n        stopMomentum();\n        stopZoomAnimation();\n\n        // Get camera position from store (always current, no stale closures)\n        const currentCamera = canvasStore.getState().viewport.camera;\n\n        // Track pointer down position for click detection (F019)\n        pointerDownPosRef.current = { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY };\n        pointerMovedRef.current = false;\n\n        // Start pan in store\n        canvasStore.dispatch(\n          canvasActions.viewport.startPan({\n            panStart: { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY },\n            cameraPosAtPanStart: currentCamera,\n          })\n        );\n\n        // Initialize velocity tracking\n        const now = performance.now();\n        lastPointerPosRef.current = { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY, time: now };\n        velocitySamplesRef.current = [];\n      }\n\n      (e.target as HTMLElement).setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);\n    },\n    [zoom, isInitialized, stopMomentum, stopZoomAnimation]\n  );\n\n  /**\n   * Handle hover detection (F018)\n   * Updates hovered task based on mouse position\n   */\n  const updateHover = useCallback(\n    (e: React.PointerEvent) => {\n      // Only update hover when not panning (avoid expensive calculations during drag)\n      const state = canvasStore.getState();\n      if (state.viewport.isPanning) {\n        // Clear hover during panning\n        if (state.interaction.hoveredTaskId !== null) {\n          canvasStore.dispatch(canvasActions.interaction.setHoveredTask(null));\n        }\n        return;\n      }\n\n      // Get container rect for coordinate conversion\n      const container = containerRef.current;\n      if (!container) return;\n\n      const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();\n      const camera = state.viewport.camera;\n\n      // Find task under cursor\n      const taskId = findTaskAtPosition(\n        e.clientX,\n        e.clientY,\n        rect,\n        camera.x,\n        camera.y,\n        zoom,\n        canvasSize.width,\n        canvasSize.height,\n        tasks\n      );\n\n      // Only update if changed (avoid unnecessary state updates)\n      if (taskId !== state.interaction.hoveredTaskId) {\n        canvasStore.dispatch(canvasActions.interaction.setHoveredTask(taskId));\n      }\n    },\n    [zoom, canvasSize, tasks]\n  );\n\n  /**\n   * Handle pan move / pinch move\n   *\n   * Now uses canvasStore for pan state - values always current\n   */\n  const handlePointerMove = useCallback(\n    (e: React.PointerEvent) => {\n      const pinch = pinchRef.current;\n\n      // Update pointer position\n      if (pinch.pointers.has(e.pointerId)) {\n        pinch.pointers.set(e.pointerId, { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY });\n      }\n\n      // Handle pinch gesture\n      if (pinch.active && pinch.pointers.size === 2) {\n        const pointers = Array.from(pinch.pointers.values());\n        const dx = pointers[0].x - pointers[1].x;\n        const dy = pointers[0].y - pointers[1].y;\n        const currentDistance = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);\n\n        if (pinch.initialDistance > 0) {\n          const scale = currentDistance / pinch.initialDistance;\n          const centerX = (pointers[0].x + pointers[1].x) / 2;\n          const centerY = (pointers[0].y + pointers[1].y) / 2;\n          handlePinchZoom(scale, centerX, centerY);\n        }\n        return;\n      }\n\n      // Update hover state (F018) - always run to update cursor\n      updateHover(e);\n\n      // Handle pan - get current state from store\n      const state = canvasStore.getState();\n      if (!state.viewport.isPanning) return;\n\n      const dx = (e.clientX - state.viewport.panStart.x) / zoom;\n      const dy = (e.clientY - state.viewport.panStart.y) / zoom;\n\n      // Detect significant movement (F019: to distinguish click from pan)\n      // Using 8px threshold - movement greater than this is a pan, not a click\n      // Higher threshold helps with touchpad/mouse precision issues\n      const moveX = e.clientX - pointerDownPosRef.current.x;\n      const moveY = e.clientY - pointerDownPosRef.current.y;\n      const moveDistance = Math.sqrt(moveX * moveX + moveY * moveY);\n      if (moveDistance > 8) {\n        pointerMovedRef.current = true;\n      }\n\n      const newX = state.viewport.cameraPosAtPanStart.x - dx;\n      const newY = state.viewport.cameraPosAtPanStart.y + dy;\n\n      const clamped = clampCameraToWorld(newX, newY, zoom);\n\n      // Update pan in store\n      canvasStore.dispatch(canvasActions.viewport.updatePan({ camera: clamped }));\n      notifyViewportChange(clamped.x, clamped.y, zoom);\n\n      // Track velocity samples for momentum\n      const now = performance.now();\n      const worldDx = (e.clientX - lastPointerPosRef.current.x) / zoom;\n      const worldDy = (e.clientY - lastPointerPosRef.current.y) / zoom;\n\n      velocitySamplesRef.current.push({\n        x: worldDx,\n        y: worldDy,\n        time: now,\n      });\n\n      // Keep only recent samples\n      if (velocitySamplesRef.current.length > MOMENTUM_VELOCITY_SAMPLES * 2) {\n        velocitySamplesRef.current = velocitySamplesRef.current.slice(-MOMENTUM_VELOCITY_SAMPLES);\n      }\n\n      lastPointerPosRef.current = { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY, time: now };\n    },\n    [zoom, clampCameraToWorld, notifyViewportChange, handlePinchZoom, updateHover]\n  );\n\n  /**\n   * Handle pan end / pinch end\n   *\n   * Now uses canvasStore for pan state\n   */\n  const handlePointerUp = useCallback(\n    (e: React.PointerEvent) => {\n      const pinch = pinchRef.current;\n\n      // Remove pointer from tracking\n      pinch.pointers.delete(e.pointerId);\n\n      // Release pointer capture\n      try {\n        (e.target as HTMLElement).releasePointerCapture(e.pointerId);\n      } catch {\n        // Ignore if capture was already released\n      }\n\n      // Reset pinch state when all pointers released\n      if (pinch.pointers.size < 2) {\n        pinch.active = false;\n        pinch.initialDistance = 0;\n      }\n\n      // Handle pan end with momentum - check store for isPanning\n      const state = canvasStore.getState();\n      if (state.viewport.isPanning && pinch.pointers.size === 0) {\n        canvasStore.dispatch(canvasActions.viewport.endPan());\n\n        // BUG-008: Momentum disabled - was causing elastic/jumping behavior\n        // The momentum animation had stale closure issues despite the cameraPosRef fix\n        // TODO: Reimplement with proper state synchronization if momentum UX is desired\n        // Original code:\n        // const { vx, vy } = calculateAverageVelocity();\n        // const speed = Math.sqrt(vx ** 2 + vy ** 2);\n        // if (speed > 0.01) { startMomentum(vx, vy); }\n      }\n    },\n    [calculateAverageVelocity, startMomentum]\n  );\n\n  /**\n   * Handle double-click to zoom in at click location\n   * Zooms 2x toward the clicked point with smooth animation\n   *\n   * Now uses animateZoomTo which uses the canvasStore\n   */\n  const handleDoubleClick = useCallback(\n    (e: React.MouseEvent) => {\n      if (!isInitialized) return;\n\n      // Stop any active animations\n      stopMomentum();\n      stopZoomAnimation();\n\n      const rect = containerRef.current?.getBoundingClientRect();\n      if (!rect) return;\n\n      // Get current camera from store\n      const currentCamera = canvasStore.getState().viewport.camera;\n\n      // Calculate target zoom (2x, clamped to MAX_ZOOM)\n      const targetZoom = Math.min(zoom * 2, MAX_ZOOM);\n      if (Math.abs(targetZoom - zoom) < 0.001) return;\n\n      // Cursor position relative to canvas center\n      const cursorX = e.clientX - rect.left - rect.width / 2;\n      const cursorY = e.clientY - rect.top - rect.height / 2;\n\n      // Calculate target camera position (zoom toward click point)\n      const worldX = cursorX / zoom + currentCamera.x;\n      const worldY = -cursorY / zoom + currentCamera.y;\n      const newCameraX = worldX - cursorX / targetZoom;\n      const newCameraY = worldY + cursorY / targetZoom;\n\n      const clamped = clampCameraToWorld(newCameraX, newCameraY, targetZoom);\n\n      // Animate with slightly longer duration for double-click (350ms)\n      animateZoomTo(targetZoom, clamped.x, clamped.y, 350);\n    },\n    [zoom, isInitialized, stopMomentum, stopZoomAnimation, clampCameraToWorld, animateZoomTo]\n  );\n\n  /**\n   * Handle click to select/deselect task (F019)\n   * Clicks on tasks select them, clicks on background deselect\n   */\n  const handleClick = useCallback(\n    (e: React.MouseEvent) => {\n      if (!isInitialized) return;\n\n      // Don't process clicks that are part of a pan gesture\n      // If pointer moved significantly between down and up, this is a pan, not a click\n      if (pointerMovedRef.current) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const state = canvasStore.getState();\n\n      const container = containerRef.current;\n      if (!container) return;\n\n      const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();\n      const camera = state.viewport.camera;\n\n      // Find task at click position\n      const taskId = findTaskAtPosition(\n        e.clientX,\n        e.clientY,\n        rect,\n        camera.x,\n        camera.y,\n        zoom,\n        canvasSize.width,\n        canvasSize.height,\n        tasks\n      );\n\n      if (taskId) {\n        // Toggle selection: if clicking same task, deselect; otherwise, select\n        if (taskId === state.interaction.selectedTaskId) {\n          canvasStore.dispatch(canvasActions.interaction.clearSelection());\n        } else {\n          canvasStore.dispatch(canvasActions.interaction.setSelectedTask(taskId));\n        }\n      } else {\n        // Clicked on background: clear selection\n        if (state.interaction.selectedTaskId !== null) {\n          canvasStore.dispatch(canvasActions.interaction.clearSelection());\n        }\n      }\n    },\n    [isInitialized, zoom, canvasSize, tasks]\n  );\n\n  /**\n   * Handle pointer leave - clear pan and hover state\n   */\n  const handlePointerLeave = useCallback(\n    (e: React.PointerEvent) => {\n      // Handle pan end\n      handlePointerUp(e);\n      // Clear hover state (F018)\n      canvasStore.dispatch(canvasActions.interaction.clearHover());\n    },\n    [handlePointerUp]\n  );\n\n  // Determine cursor style: grabbing when panning, pointer when hovering task, grab otherwise\n  const cursorStyle = isPanning ? 'grabbing' : isHoverable ? 'pointer' : 'grab';\n\n  // Generate aria-label with current state information (F022)\n  const ariaLabel = `Metro maintenance planning canvas. ${LOD_LABELS[lod]}. ${formatZoomForAria(zoom)}. Use Tab to navigate tasks, Enter to select, Arrow keys to pan, plus minus to zoom.`;\n\n  return (\n    <div\n      ref={containerRef}\n      // F022: ARIA attributes for accessibility\n      role=\"application\"\n      aria-label={ariaLabel}\n      aria-roledescription=\"Interactive maintenance scheduling canvas\"\n      style={{\n        width: '100%',\n        height: '100%',\n        cursor: cursorStyle,\n        touchAction: 'none',\n        position: 'relative', // For absolute positioning of live region\n      }}\n      onPointerDown={handlePointerDown}\n      onPointerMove={handlePointerMove}\n      onPointerUp={handlePointerUp}\n      onPointerLeave={handlePointerLeave}\n      onDoubleClick={handleDoubleClick}\n      onClick={handleClick}\n    >\n
