Default: 1 */\n  opacity?: number;\n  /** Viewport bounds for culling (PERF-002) */\n  viewportBounds?: ViewportBounds;\n  /** Spatial index for efficient viewport queries (PERF-002) */\n  spatialIndex?: ISpatialIndex;\n  /** Currently hovered task ID for highlight effect */\n  hoveredTaskId?: string | null;\n  /** Currently selected task ID for selection highlight (F019) */\n  selectedTaskId?: string | null;\n  /** Currently keyboard-focused task ID for focus indicator (F021) */\n  focusedTaskId?: string | null;\n}\n\n// Color palette matching POC reference\nconst COLORS: Record<string, string> = {\n  blue: '#3b82f6',    // maintenance\n  orange: '#f59e0b',  // overhaul\n  gray: '#9ca3af',    // inspection\n};\n\nconst CONFLICT_COLOR = '#ef4444'; // red for conflicts\n\n// Row background colors (alternating)\nconst ROW_BG_EVEN = '#ffffff';\nconst ROW_BG_ODD = '#f8fafc';\n\nconst { pxPerDay, pxPerTrain } = DEFAULT_VIEW_CONFIG;\n\n// Task block height (with padding)\nconst TASK_HEIGHT = pxPerTrain - 4; // 20px height with 2px padding top/bottom\nconst TASK_PADDING_Y = 2;\n\n/**\n * Renders alternating row backgrounds for train rows using InstancedMesh\n * OPTIMIZED: Single draw call instead of 50 individual meshes\n */\nfunction RowBackgrounds({\n  trainCount,\n  totalDays,\n  opacity = 1,\n}: {\n  trainCount: number;\n  totalDays: number;\n  opacity?: number;\n}) {\n  const totalWidth = totalDays * pxPerDay;\n  const meshRef = useRef<InstancedMesh>(null);\n  const tempObject = useMemo(() => new Object3D(), []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!meshRef.current || trainCount === 0) return;\n\n    const mesh = meshRef.current;\n\n    for (let i = 0; i < trainCount; i++) {\n      tempObject.position.set(\n        totalWidth / 2, // Center the row\n        -i * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2, // Y position (negative = down)\n        -0.1 // Behind tasks\n      );\n      tempObject.scale.set(totalWidth, pxPerTrain, 1);\n      tempObject.updateMatrix();\n      mesh.setMatrixAt(i, tempObject.matrix);\n      mesh.setColorAt(i, new Color(i % 2 === 0 ? ROW_BG_EVEN : ROW_BG_ODD));\n    }\n\n    mesh.instanceMatrix.needsUpdate = true;\n    if (mesh.instanceColor) {\n      mesh.instanceColor.needsUpdate = true;\n    }\n  }, [trainCount, totalWidth, tempObject]);\n\n  if (trainCount === 0) return null;\n\n  return (\n    <instancedMesh ref={meshRef} args={[undefined, undefined, trainCount]}>\n      <planeGeometry args={[1, 1]} />\n      <meshBasicMaterial transparent opacity={0.5 * opacity} />\n    </instancedMesh>\n  );\n}\n\n// Highlight color multiplier for hovered tasks\n// Using high value for clear visual feedback\nconst HOVER_BRIGHTNESS = 1.8;\n\n// Selection indicator color (distinct cyan/teal)\nconst SELECTION_COLOR = '#06b6d4'; // cyan-500\n\n// Focus indicator color (F021 - keyboard focus)\n// Using a distinct purple for focus to differentiate from selection\nconst FOCUS_COLOR = '#8b5cf6'; // violet-500\n\n/**\n * Brighten a color for hover effect\n */\nfunction brightenColor(hexColor: string, factor: number): Color {\n  const color = new Color(hexColor);\n  color.r = Math.min(1, color.r * factor);\n  color.g = Math.min(1, color.g * factor);\n  color.b = Math.min(1, color.b * factor);\n  return color;\n}\n\n/**\n * Main task blocks using InstancedMesh\n */\nfunction TaskBlocks({\n  tasks,\n  opacity = 1,\n  hoveredTaskId,\n  selectedTaskId,\n  focusedTaskId,\n}: {\n  tasks: TaskRender[];\n  opacity?: number;\n  hoveredTaskId?: string | null;\n  selectedTaskId?: string | null;\n  focusedTaskId?: string | null;\n}) {\n  const meshRef = useRef<InstancedMesh>(null);\n  const tempObject = useMemo(() => new Object3D(), []);\n  const tempColor = useMemo(() => new Color(), []);\n\n  // Update instance matrices and colors when tasks change or hover/selection/focus changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!meshRef.current) return;\n\n    const mesh = meshRef.current;\n\n    tasks.forEach((task, i) => {\n      // Calculate position and size\n      const width = task.duration * pxPerDay;\n      const height = TASK_HEIGHT;\n      const x = task.startDay * pxPerDay + width / 2; // Center of task\n      const y = -task.trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2; // Negative Y (down)\n      // Z ordering: selected > focused > conflict > hovered > normal\n      const isSelected = task.id === selectedTaskId;\n      const isFocused = task.id === focusedTaskId;\n      const isHovered = task.id === hoveredTaskId;\n      const z = isSelected ? 0.2 : isFocused ? 0.15 : task.hasConflict ? 0.1 : isHovered ? 0.05 : 0;\n\n      // Set transform\n      tempObject.position.set(x, y, z);\n      tempObject.scale.set(width, height, 1);\n      tempObject.updateMatrix();\n      mesh.setMatrixAt(i, tempObject.matrix);\n\n      // Set color: selected gets distinct color, focused gets focus color, hovered gets brightened, normal is base\n      if (isSelected) {\n        tempColor.set(SELECTION_COLOR);\n        mesh.setColorAt(i, tempColor);\n      } else if (isFocused) {\n        // Focus uses a distinct purple color to differentiate from selection and hover\n        tempColor.set(FOCUS_COLOR);\n        mesh.setColorAt(i, tempColor);\n      } else if (isHovered) {\n        const baseColor = task.hasConflict ? CONFLICT_COLOR : COLORS[task.color];\n        const brightened = brightenColor(baseColor, HOVER_BRIGHTNESS);\n        mesh.setColorAt(i, brightened);\n      } else {\n        const baseColor = task.hasConflict ? CONFLICT_COLOR : COLORS[task.color];\n        tempColor.set(baseColor);\n        mesh.setColorAt(i, tempColor);\n      }\n    });\n\n    // Mark buffers for update\n    mesh.instanceMatrix.needsUpdate = true;\n    if (mesh.instanceColor) {\n      mesh.instanceColor.needsUpdate = true;\n    }\n  }, [tasks, tempObject, tempColor, hoveredTaskId, selectedTaskId, focusedTaskId]);\n\n  if (tasks.length === 0) {\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <instancedMesh\n      ref={meshRef}\n      args={[undefined, undefined, tasks.length]}\n    >\n      {/* Unit plane centered at origin - will be scaled by instance matrix */}\n      <planeGeometry args={[1, 1]} />\n      <meshBasicMaterial toneMapped={false} transparent={opacity < 1} opacity={opacity} />\n    </instancedMesh>\n  );\n}\n\n/**\n * Conflict glow effect layer\n * Renders a subtle glow behind conflict tasks\n */\nfunction ConflictGlows({ tasks, opacity = 1 }: { tasks: TaskRender[]; opacity?: number }) {\n  const conflictTasks = useMemo(\n    () => tasks.filter((t) => t.hasConflict),\n    [tasks]\n  );\n\n  const meshRef = useRef<InstancedMesh>(null);\n  const tempObject = useMemo(() => new Object3D(), []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!meshRef.current || conflictTasks.length === 0) return;\n\n    const mesh = meshRef.current;\n\n    conflictTasks.forEach((task, i) => {\n      const width = task.duration * pxPerDay + 6; // Slightly larger for glow\n      const height = TASK_HEIGHT + 6;\n      const x = task.startDay * pxPerDay + (task.duration * pxPerDay) / 2;\n      const y = -task.trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2;\n      const z = -0.05; // Behind the task block\n\n      tempObject.position.set(x, y, z);\n      tempObject.scale.set(width, height, 1);\n      tempObject.updateMatrix();\n      mesh.setMatrixAt(i, tempObject.matrix);\n    });\n\n    mesh.instanceMatrix.needsUpdate = true;\n  }, [conflictTasks, tempObject]);\n\n  if (conflictTasks.length === 0) {\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <instancedMesh\n      ref={meshRef}\n      args={[undefined, undefined, conflictTasks.length]}\n    >\n      <planeGeometry args={[1, 1]} />\n      <meshBasicMaterial\n        color={CONFLICT_COLOR}\n        transparent\n        opacity={0.3 * opacity}\n      />\n    </instancedMesh>\n  );\n}\n\n/**\n * Focus ring effect layer (F021)\n * Renders a pulsing ring around the focused task for accessibility\n */\nfunction FocusRing({\n  tasks,\n  focusedTaskId,\n  opacity = 1,\n}: {\n  tasks: TaskRender[];\n  focusedTaskId: string | null;\n  opacity?: number;\n}) {\n  const focusedTask = useMemo(\n    () => (focusedTaskId ? tasks.find((t) => t.id === focusedTaskId) : null),\n    [tasks, focusedTaskId]\n  );\n\n  const meshRef = useRef<InstancedMesh>(null);\n  const tempObject = useMemo(() => new Object3D(), []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!meshRef.current) return;\n\n    const mesh = meshRef.current;\n\n    if (focusedTask) {\n      const width = focusedTask.duration * pxPerDay + 8; // Larger for ring effect\n      const height = TASK_HEIGHT + 8;\n      const x = focusedTask.startDay * pxPerDay + (focusedTask.duration * pxPerDay) / 2;\n      const y = -focusedTask.trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2;\n      const z = 0.12; // Between focus and conflict glows\n\n      tempObject.position.set(x, y, z);\n      tempObject.scale.set(width, height, 1);\n      tempObject.updateMatrix();\n      mesh.setMatrixAt(0, tempObject.matrix);\n    } else {\n      // Hide the ring by scaling to zero\n      tempObject.scale.set(0, 0, 1);\n      tempObject.updateMatrix();\n      mesh.setMatrixAt(0, tempObject.matrix);\n    }\n\n    mesh.instanceMatrix.needsUpdate = true;\n  }, [focusedTask, tempObject]);\n\n  return (\n    <instancedMesh ref={meshRef} args={[undefined, undefined, 1]}>\n      <planeGeometry args={[1, 1]} />\n      <meshBasicMaterial\n        color={FOCUS_COLOR}\n        transparent\n        opacity={0.4 * opacity}\n      />\n    </instancedMesh>\n  );\n}\n\n/**\n * MesoLayer Component\n *\n * Renders the DNA-like task block visualization for the MESO LOD level.\n */\nexport function MesoLayer({\n  tasks,\n  trainCount,\n  opacity = 1,\n  viewportBounds,\n  spatialIndex,\n  hoveredTaskId,\n  selectedTaskId,\n  focusedTaskId,\n}: MesoLayerProps) {\n  // NOTE: viewportBounds + spatialIndex are available for viewport culling (PERF-002 complete).\n  // Currently not filtering tasks here as InstancedMesh handles all instances efficiently.\n  // Consider adding culling if task count exceeds 100k and performance degrades.\n  // Calculate total days for row backgrounds\n  const totalDays = useMemo(() => {\n    if (tasks.length === 0) return 365 * 10; // Default: 10 years\n    const maxDay = Math.max(...tasks.map((t) => t.startDay + t.duration));\n    return Math.max(maxDay + 30, 365 * 10); // Add padding\n  }, [tasks]);\n\n  return (\n    <group>\n      {/* Row backgrounds (behind everything) */}\n      <RowBackgrounds trainCount={trainCount} totalDays={totalDays} opacity={opacity} />\n\n      {/* Conflict glow effects (behind task blocks) */}\n      <ConflictGlows tasks={tasks} opacity={opacity} />\n\n      {/* Focus ring effect (F021 - behind focused task block) */}\n      <FocusRing tasks={tasks} focusedTaskId={focusedTaskId ?? null} opacity={opacity} />\n\n      {/* Main task blocks */}\n      <TaskBlocks\n        tasks={tasks}\n        opacity={opacity}\n        hoveredTaskId={hoveredTaskId}\n        selectedTaskId={selectedTaskId}\n        focusedTaskId={focusedTaskId}\n      />\n    </group>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":51,"oldLines":7,"newStart":51,"newLines":7,"lines":[" "," // Task block height (with padding)"," const TASK_HEIGHT = pxPerTrain - 4; // cyan-500\n\n// Focus indicator color (F021 - keyboard focus)\n// Using a distinct purple for focus to differentiate from selection\nconst FOCUS_COLOR = '#8b5cf6'; // violet-500\n\n/**\n * Brighten a color for hover effect\n */\nfunction brightenColor(hexColor: string, factor: number): Color {\n  const color = new Color(hexColor);\n  color.r = Math.min(1, color.r * factor);\n  color.g = Math.min(1, color.g * factor);\n  color.b = Math.min(1, color.b * factor);\n  return color;\n}\n\n/**\n * Main task blocks using InstancedMesh\n */\nfunction TaskBlocks({\n  tasks,\n  opacity = 1,\n  hoveredTaskId,\n  selectedTaskId,\n  focusedTaskId,\n}: {\n  tasks: TaskRender[];\n  opacity?: number;\n  hoveredTaskId?: string | null;\n  selectedTaskId?: string | null;\n  focusedTaskId?: string | null;\n}) {\n  const meshRef = useRef<InstancedMesh>(null);\n  const tempObject = useMemo(() => new Object3D(), []);\n  const tempColor = useMemo(() => new Color(), []);\n\n  // Update instance matrices and colors when tasks change or hover/selection/focus changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!meshRef.current) return;\n\n    const mesh = meshRef.current;\n\n    tasks.forEach((task, i) => {\n      // Calculate position and size\n      const width = task.duration * pxPerDay;\n      const height = TASK_HEIGHT;\n      const x = task.startDay * pxPerDay + width / 2; // Center of task\n      const y = -task.trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2; // Negative Y (down)\n      // Z ordering: selected > focused > conflict > hovered > normal\n      const isSelected = task.id === selectedTaskId;\n      const isFocused = task.id === focusedTaskId;\n      const isHovered = task.id === hoveredTaskId;\n      const z = isSelected ? 0.2 : isFocused ? 0.15 : task.hasConflict ? 0.1 : isHovered ? 0.05 : 0;\n\n      // Set transform\n      tempObject.position.set(x, y, z);\n      tempObject.scale.set(width, height, 1);\n      tempObject.updateMatrix();\n      mesh.setMatrixAt(i, tempObject.matrix);\n\n      // Set color: selected gets distinct color, focused gets focus color, hovered gets brightened, normal is base\n      if (isSelected) {\n        tempColor.set(SELECTION_COLOR);\n        mesh.setColorAt(i, tempColor);\n      } else if (isFocused) {\n        // Focus uses a distinct purple color to differentiate from selection and hover\n        tempColor.set(FOCUS_COLOR);\n        mesh.setColorAt(i, tempColor);\n      } else if (isHovered) {\n        const baseColor = task.hasConflict ? CONFLICT_COLOR : COLORS[task.color];\n        const brightened = brightenColor(baseColor, HOVER_BRIGHTNESS);\n        mesh.setColorAt(i, brightened);\n      } else {\n        const baseColor = task.hasConflict ? CONFLICT_COLOR : COLORS[task.color];\n        tempColor.set(baseColor);\n        mesh.setColorAt(i, tempColor);\n      }\n    });\n\n    // Mark buffers for update\n    mesh.instanceMatrix.needsUpdate = true;\n    if (mesh.instanceColor) {\n      mesh.instanceColor.needsUpdate = true;\n    }\n  }, [tasks, tempObject, tempColor, hoveredTaskId, selectedTaskId, focusedTaskId]);\n\n  if (tasks.length === 0) {\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <instancedMesh\n      ref={meshRef}\n      args={[undefined, undefined, tasks.length]}\n    >\n      {/* Unit plane centered at origin - will be scaled by instance matrix */}\n      <planeGeometry args={[1, 1]} />\n      <meshBasicMaterial toneMapped={false} transparent={opacity < 1} opacity={opacity} />\n    </instancedMesh>\n  );\n}\n\n/**\n * Conflict glow effect layer\n * Renders a subtle glow behind conflict tasks\n */\nfunction ConflictGlows({ tasks, opacity = 1 }: { tasks: TaskRender[]; opacity?: number }) {\n  const conflictTasks = useMemo(\n    () => tasks.filter((t) => t.hasConflict),\n    [tasks]\n  );\n\n  const meshRef = useRef<InstancedMesh>(null);\n  const tempObject = useMemo(() => new Object3D(), []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!meshRef.current || conflictTasks.length === 0) return;\n\n    const mesh = meshRef.current;\n\n    conflictTasks.forEach((task, i) => {\n      const width = task.duration * pxPerDay + 6; // Slightly larger for glow\n      const height = TASK_HEIGHT + 6;\n      const x = task.startDay * pxPerDay + (task.duration * pxPerDay) / 2;\n      const y = -task.trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2;\n      const z = -0.05; // Behind the task block\n\n      tempObject.position.set(x, y, z);\n      tempObject.scale.set(width, height, 1);\n      tempObject.updateMatrix();\n      mesh.setMatrixAt(i, tempObject.matrix);\n    });\n\n    mesh.instanceMatrix.needsUpdate = true;\n  }, [conflictTasks, tempObject]);\n\n  if (conflictTasks.length === 0) {\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <instancedMesh\n      ref={meshRef}\n      args={[undefined, undefined, conflictTasks.length]}\n    >\n      <planeGeometry args={[1, 1]} />\n      <meshBasicMaterial\n        color={CONFLICT_COLOR}\n        transparent\n        opacity={0.3 * opacity}\n      />\n    </instancedMesh>\n  );\n}\n\n/**\n * Focus ring effect layer (F021)\n * Renders a pulsing ring around the focused task for accessibility\n */\nfunction FocusRing({\n  tasks,\n  focusedTaskId,\n  opacity = 1,\n}: {\n  tasks: TaskRender[];\n  focusedTaskId: string | null;\n  opacity?: number;\n}) {\n  const focusedTask = useMemo(\n    () => (focusedTaskId ? tasks.find((t) => t.id === focusedTaskId) : null),\n    [tasks, focusedTaskId]\n  );\n\n  const meshRef = useRef<InstancedMesh>(null);\n  const tempObject = useMemo(() => new Object3D(), []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!meshRef.current) return;\n\n    const mesh = meshRef.current;\n\n    if (focusedTask) {\n      const width = focusedTask.duration * pxPerDay + 8; // Larger for ring effect\n      const height = TASK_HEIGHT + 8;\n      const x = focusedTask.startDay * pxPerDay + (focusedTask.duration * pxPerDay) / 2;\n      const y = -focusedTask.trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2;\n      const z = 0.12; // Between focus and conflict glows\n\n      tempObject.position.set(x, y, z);\n      tempObject.scale.set(width, height, 1);\n      tempObject.updateMatrix();\n      mesh.setMatrixAt(0, tempObject.matrix);\n    } else {\n      // Hide the ring by scaling to zero\n      tempObject.scale.set(0, 0, 1);\n      tempObject.updateMatrix();\n      mesh.setMatrixAt(0, tempObject.matrix);\n    }\n\n    mesh.instanceMatrix.needsUpdate = true;\n  }, [focusedTask, tempObject]);\n\n  return (\n    <instancedMesh ref={meshRef} args={[undefined, undefined, 1]}>\n      <planeGeometry args={[1, 1]} />\n      <meshBasicMaterial\n        color={FOCUS_COLOR}\n        transparent\n        opacity={0.4 * opacity}\n      />\n    </instancedMesh>\n  );\n}\n\n/**\n * MesoLayer Component\n *\n * Renders the DNA-like task block visualization for the MESO LOD level.\n */\nexport function MesoLayer({\n  tasks,\n  trainCount,\n  opacity = 1,\n  viewportBounds,\n  spatialIndex,\n  hoveredTaskId,\n  selectedTaskId,\n  focusedTaskId,\n}: MesoLayerProps) {\n  // NOTE: viewportBounds + spatialIndex are available for viewport culling (PERF-002 complete).\n  // Currently not filtering tasks here as InstancedMesh handles all instances efficiently.\n  // Consider adding culling if task count exceeds 100k and performance degrades.\n  // Calculate total days for row backgrounds\n  const totalDays = useMemo(() => {\n    if (tasks.length === 0) return 365 * 10; // Default: 10 years\n    const maxDay = Math.max(...tasks.map((t) => t.startDay + t.duration));\n    return Math.max(maxDay + 30, 365 * 10); // Add padding\n  }, [tasks]);\n\n  return (\n    <group>\n      {/* Row backgrounds (behind everything) */}\n      <RowBackgrounds trainCount={trainCount} totalDays={totalDays} opacity={opacity} />\n\n      {/* Conflict glow effects (behind task blocks) */}\n      <ConflictGlows tasks={tasks} opacity={opacity} />\n\n      {/* Focus ring effect (F021 - behind focused task block) */}\n      <FocusRing tasks={tasks} focusedTaskId={focusedTaskId ?? null} opacity={opacity} />\n\n      {/* Main task blocks */}\n      <TaskBlocks\n        tasks={tasks}\n        opacity={opacity}\n        hoveredTaskId={hoveredTaskId}\n        selectedTaskId={selectedTaskId}\n        focusedTaskId={focusedTaskId}\n      />\n    </group>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":332,"oldLines":13,"newStart":332,"newLines":13,"lines":["   tasks,","   trainCount,","   opacity = 1,","-  viewportBounds,","-  spatialIndex,","+  viewportBounds: _viewportBounds,","+  spatialIndex: _spatialIndex,","   hoveredTaskId,","   selectedTaskId,","   focusedTaskId,"," }: MesoLayerProps) {","-  // NOTE: viewportBounds + spatialIndex are available for viewport culling (PERF-002 complete).","+  // NOTE: _viewportBounds + _spatialIndex are available for viewport culling (PERF-002 complete).","   // Currently not filtering tasks here as InstancedMesh handles all instances efficiently.","   // Consider adding culling if task count exceeds 100k and performance degrades.","   // Calculate total days for row backgrounds"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"0f136194-f831-4893-aa15-239bc182d41a"}

InstancedMesh for grid lines: Single draw call instead of ~251 meshes\n * - Lazy label rendering: Only labels for visible tasks\n * - InstancedMesh for row backgrounds: Single draw call instead of 50 meshes\n */\n\nimport { useMemo, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { InstancedMesh, Object3D, Color, Vector3 } from 'three';\nimport { Html, Line } from '@react-three/drei';\nimport { useThree } from '@react-three/fiber';\nimport type { TaskRender } from '../../data/types';\nimport { DEFAULT_VIEW_CONFIG } from '../../data/types';\nimport type { ViewportBounds } from '../InfiniteCanvas';\n\ninterface MicroLayerProps {\n  tasks: TaskRender[];\n  trainCount: number;\n  /** Opacity for LOD transitions (0-1). Default: 1 */\n  opacity?: number;\n  /** Viewport bounds for frustum culling */\n  viewportBounds?: ViewportBounds;\n  /** Currently hovered task ID for highlight effect */\n  hoveredTaskId?: string | null;\n  /** Currently selected task ID for selection highlight (F019) */\n  selectedTaskId?: string | null;\n  /** Currently keyboard-focused task ID for focus indicator (F021) */\n  focusedTaskId?: string | null;\n}\n\nconst { pxPerDay, pxPerTrain } = DEFAULT_VIEW_CONFIG;\n\n// Task card dimensions\nconst CARD_PADDING = 2;\nconst CARD_HEIGHT = pxPerTrain - CARD_PADDING * 2 - 2; // Slightly smaller for grid visibility\n\n// Color mappings (matching MesoLayer)\nconst COLORS: Record<string, string> = {\n  blue: '#3b82f6',\n  orange: '#f59e0b',\n  gray: '#9ca3af',\n};\nconst CONFLICT_COLOR = '#ef4444';\n\n// Grid colors\nconst GRID_COLOR_MAJOR = '#d1d5db'; // Gray-300\nconst GRID_COLOR_MINOR = '#e5e7eb'; // Gray-200\n\n// Row background colors\nconst ROW_BG_EVEN = '#ffffff';\nconst ROW_BG_ODD = '#f8fafc';\n\n/**\n * Filter tasks that are visible within the viewport bounds\n * This is the core of frustum culling for performance\n */\nfunction filterVisibleTasks(tasks: TaskRender[], viewportBounds?: ViewportBounds): TaskRender[] {\n  if (!viewportBounds) return tasks;\n\n  // Add padding to viewport bounds (render slightly outside visible area for smooth panning)\n  const padding = 100; // world units\n  const minX = viewportBounds.minX - padding;\n  const maxX = viewportBounds.maxX + padding;\n  const minY = viewportBounds.minY - padding;\n  const maxY = viewportBounds.maxY + padding;\n\n  return tasks.filter((task) => {\n    const taskStartX = task.startDay * pxPerDay;\n    const taskEndX = taskStartX + task.duration * pxPerDay;\n    const taskY = -task.trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2;\n\n    // Check if task overlaps with viewport\n    const xOverlap = taskEndX >= minX && taskStartX <= maxX;\n    const yOverlap = taskY + pxPerTrain / 2 >= minY && taskY - pxPerTrain / 2 <= maxY;\n\n    return xOverlap && yOverlap;\n  });\n}\n\n// Highlight color multiplier for hovered tasks\nconst HOVER_BRIGHTNESS = 1.3;\n\n// Selection indicator color (distinct cyan/teal)\nconst SELECTION_COLOR = '#06b6d4'; // cyan-500\n\n// Focus indicator color (F021 - keyboard focus)\nconst FOCUS_COLOR = '#8b5cf6'; // violet-500\n\n/**\n * Brighten a color for hover effect\n */\nfunction brightenColor(hexColor: string, factor: number): Color {\n  const color = new Color(hexColor);\n  color.r = Math.min(1, color.r * factor);\n  color.g = Math.min(1, color.g * factor);\n  color.b = Math.min(1, color.b * factor);\n  return color;\n}\n\n/**\n * Task cards using InstancedMesh (same pattern as MesoLayer)\n */\nfunction TaskCards({\n  tasks,\n  opacity = 1,\n  hoveredTaskId,\n  selectedTaskId,\n  focusedTaskId,\n}: {\n  tasks: TaskRender[];\n  opacity?: number;\n  hoveredTaskId?: string | null;\n  selectedTaskId?: string | null;\n  focusedTaskId?: string | null;\n}) {\n  const meshRef = useRef<InstancedMesh>(null);\n  const tempObject = useMemo(() => new Object3D(), []);\n  const tempColor = useMemo(() => new Color(), []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!meshRef.current || tasks.length === 0) return;\n\n    const mesh = meshRef.current;\n\n    tasks.forEach((task, i) => {\n      const width = task.duration * pxPerDay - CARD_PADDING * 2;\n      const height = CARD_HEIGHT;\n      const x = task.startDay * pxPerDay + width / 2 + CARD_PADDING;\n      const y = -task.trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2;\n      // Z ordering: selected > focused > conflict > hovered > normal\n      const isSelected = task.id === selectedTaskId;\n      const isFocused = task.id === focusedTaskId;\n      const isHovered = task.id === hoveredTaskId;\n      const z = isSelected ? 0.2 : isFocused ? 0.15 : task.hasConflict ? 0.1 : isHovered ? 0.05 : 0;\n\n      tempObject.position.set(x, y, z);\n      tempObject.scale.set(width, height, 1);\n      tempObject.updateMatrix();\n      mesh.setMatrixAt(i, tempObject.matrix);\n\n      // Set color: selected gets distinct color, focused gets focus color, hovered gets brightened, normal is base\n      if (isSelected) {\n        tempColor.set(SELECTION_COLOR);\n        mesh.setColorAt(i, tempColor);\n      } else if (isFocused) {\n        tempColor.set(FOCUS_COLOR);\n        mesh.setColorAt(i, tempColor);\n      } else if (isHovered) {\n        const baseColor = task.hasConflict ? CONFLICT_COLOR : COLORS[task.color];\n        const brightened = brightenColor(baseColor, HOVER_BRIGHTNESS);\n        mesh.setColorAt(i, brightened);\n      } else {\n        const baseColor = task.hasConflict ? CONFLICT_COLOR : COLORS[task.color];\n        tempColor.set(baseColor);\n        mesh.setColorAt(i, tempColor);\n      }\n    });\n\n    mesh.instanceMatrix.needsUpdate = true;\n    if (mesh.instanceColor) {\n      mesh.instanceColor.needsUpdate = true;\n    }\n  }, [tasks, tempObject, tempColor, hoveredTaskId, selectedTaskId, focusedTaskId]);\n\n  if (tasks.length === 0) return null;\n\n  return (\n    <instancedMesh ref={meshRef} args={[undefined, undefined, tasks.length]}>\n      <planeGeometry args={[1, 1]} />\n      <meshBasicMaterial toneMapped={false} transparent={opacity < 1} opacity={opacity} />\n    </instancedMesh>\n  );\n}\n\n/**\n * Conflict glow effects (behind task cards)\n */\nfunction ConflictGlows({ tasks, opacity = 1 }: { tasks: TaskRender[]; opacity?: number }) {\n  const conflictTasks = useMemo(() => tasks.filter((t) => t.hasConflict), [tasks]);\n  const meshRef = useRef<InstancedMesh>(null);\n  const tempObject = useMemo(() => new Object3D(), []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!meshRef.current || conflictTasks.length === 0) return;\n\n    const mesh = meshRef.current;\n\n    conflictTasks.forEach((task, i) => {\n      const width = task.duration * pxPerDay + 4;\n      const height = CARD_HEIGHT + 4;\n      const x = task.startDay * pxPerDay + (task.duration * pxPerDay) / 2;\n      const y = -task.trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2;\n      const z = -0.05;\n\n      tempObject.position.set(x, y, z);\n      tempObject.scale.set(width, height, 1);\n      tempObject.updateMatrix();\n      mesh.setMatrixAt(i, tempObject.matrix);\n    });\n\n    mesh.instanceMatrix.needsUpdate = true;\n  }, [conflictTasks, tempObject]);\n\n  if (conflictTasks.length === 0) return null;\n\n  return (\n    <instancedMesh ref={meshRef} args={[undefined, undefined, conflictTasks.length]}>\n      <planeGeometry args={[1, 1]} />\n      <meshBasicMaterial color={CONFLICT_COLOR} transparent opacity={0.3 * opacity} />\n    </instancedMesh>\n  );\n}\n\n/**\n * HTML labels for tasks - ONLY for visible tasks (lazy rendering)\n * Maximum of 50 labels rendered at once for performance\n */\nfunction TaskLabels({ tasks, opacity = 1 }: { tasks: TaskRender[]; opacity?: number }) {\n  const { camera } = useThree();\n  const zoom = (camera as any).zoom || 1;\n\n  // Only show labels on tasks wide enough (> 40 screen pixels)\n  // And limit to max 50 labels for performance\n  const labeledTasks = useMemo(() => {\n    const minWidthForLabel = 40 / zoom; // Convert screen pixels to world pixels\n    const filtered = tasks.filter((t) => t.duration * pxPerDay > minWidthForLabel);\n    // Sort by width (largest first) and take top 50\n    return filtered\n      .sort((a, b) => b.duration - a.duration)\n      .slice(0, 50);\n  }, [tasks, zoom]);\n\n  // Don't render labels during low opacity transitions (performance optimization)\n  if (opacity < 0.3) return null;\n\n  return (\n    <>\n      {labeledTasks.map((task) => {\n        const width = task.duration * pxPerDay;\n        const x = task.startDay * pxPerDay + width / 2;\n        const y = -task.trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2;\n        const label = task.type.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + task.type.slice(1);\n        // F022: Generate descriptive aria-label for screen readers\n        const ariaLabel = `${label} task, Train ${task.trainIndex + 1}, Day ${task.startDay}, Duration ${task.duration} days${task.hasConflict ? ', has conflict' : ''}`;\n\n        return (\n          <Html\n            key={task.id}\n            position={[x, y, 0.2]}\n            center\n            style={{ pointerEvents: 'none', opacity }}\n          >\n            <div\n              role=\"img\"\n              aria-label={ariaLabel}\n              style={{\n                color: 'white',\n                fontSize: '10px',\n                fontFamily: 'system-ui, sans-serif',\n                fontWeight: 600,\n                textShadow: '0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)',\n                whiteSpace: 'nowrap',\n              }}\n            >\n              {label}\n            </div>\n          </Html>\n        );\n      })}\n    </>\n  );\n}\n\n/**\n * Grid lines using InstancedMesh (OPTIMIZED - single draw call)\n * Previously: ~251 individual meshes = 251 draw calls\n * Now: 2 InstancedMesh = 2 draw calls\n */\nfunction GridLines({\n  totalDays,\n  trainCount,\n  opacity = 1,\n  viewportBounds,\n}: {\n  totalDays: number;\n  trainCount: number;\n  opacity?: number;\n  viewportBounds?: ViewportBounds;\n}) {\n  const totalWidth = totalDays * pxPerDay;\n  const totalHeight = trainCount * pxPerTrain;\n\n  // Horizontal grid lines (train boundaries) - using InstancedMesh\n  const hMeshRef = useRef<InstancedMesh>(null);\n  const hTempObject = useMemo(() => new Object3D(), []);\n\n  // Vertical grid lines (week boundaries) - using InstancedMesh\n  const vMeshRef = useRef<InstancedMesh>(null);\n  const vTempObject = useMemo(() => new Object3D(), []);\n\n  // Calculate visible horizontal lines based on viewport\n  const visibleHLines = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!viewportBounds) {\n      return Array.from({ length: trainCount + 1 }, (_, i) => i);\n    }\n    const minTrainIndex = Math.max(0, Math.floor(-viewportBounds.maxY / pxPerTrain) - 1);\n    const maxTrainIndex = Math.min(trainCount, Math.ceil(-viewportBounds.minY / pxPerTrain) + 1);\n    return Array.from({ length: maxTrainIndex - minTrainIndex + 1 }, (_, i) => minTrainIndex + i);\n  }, [trainCount, viewportBounds]);\n\n  // Calculate visible vertical lines (weeks) based on viewport\n  const visibleVLines = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!viewportBounds) {\n      const lines = [];\n      for (let day = 0; day <= totalDays; day += 7) {\n        lines.push(day);\n      }\n      return lines.slice(0, 200);\n    }\n    const minDay = Math.max(0, Math.floor(viewportBounds.minX / pxPerDay / 7) * 7 - 7);\n    const maxDay = Math.min(totalDays, Math.ceil(viewportBounds.maxX / pxPerDay / 7) * 7 + 7);\n    const lines = [];\n    for (let day = minDay; day <= maxDay; day += 7) {\n      lines.push(day);\n    }\n    return lines;\n  }, [totalDays, viewportBounds]);\n\n  // Update horizontal lines InstancedMesh\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!hMeshRef.current || visibleHLines.length === 0) return;\n\n    const mesh = hMeshRef.current;\n    visibleHLines.forEach((trainIndex, i) => {\n      hTempObject.position.set(totalWidth / 2, -trainIndex * pxPerTrain, -0.05);\n      hTempObject.scale.set(totalWidth, 1, 1);\n      hTempObject.updateMatrix();\n      mesh.setMatrixAt(i, hTempObject.matrix);\n    });\n    mesh.instanceMatrix.needsUpdate = true;\n  }, [visibleHLines, totalWidth, hTempObject]);\n\n  // Update vertical lines InstancedMesh\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!vMeshRef.current || visibleVLines.length === 0) return;\n\n    const mesh = vMeshRef.current;\n    visibleVLines.forEach((day, i) => {\n      const isMajor = day % 30 === 0;\n      vTempObject.position.set(day * pxPerDay, -totalHeight / 2, -0.05);\n      vTempObject.scale.set(isMajor ? 1.5 : 1, totalHeight, 1);\n      vTempObject.updateMatrix();\n      mesh.setMatrixAt(i, vTempObject.matrix);\n      mesh.setColorAt(i, new Color(isMajor ? GRID_COLOR_MAJOR : GRID_COLOR_MINOR));\n    });\n    mesh.instanceMatrix.needsUpdate = true;\n    if (mesh.instanceColor) {\n      mesh.instanceColor.needsUpdate = true;\n    }\n  }, [visibleVLines, totalHeight, vTempObject]);\n\n  return (\n    <group>\n      {/* Horizontal lines - InstancedMesh */}\n      {visibleHLines.length > 0 && (\n        <instancedMesh ref={hMeshRef} args={[undefined, undefined, visibleHLines.length]}>\n          <planeGeometry args={[1, 1]} />\n          <meshBasicMaterial color={GRID_COLOR_MAJOR} transparent opacity={0.5 * opacity} />\n        </instancedMesh>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Vertical lines - InstancedMesh */}\n      {visibleVLines.length > 0 && (\n        <instancedMesh ref={vMeshRef} args={[undefined, undefined, visibleVLines.length]}>\n          <planeGeometry args={[1, 1]} />\n          <meshBasicMaterial transparent opacity={0.4 * opacity} />\n        </instancedMesh>\n      )}\n    </group>\n  );\n}\n\n/**\n * Row backgrounds using InstancedMesh (OPTIMIZED - single draw call)\n * Previously: 50 individual meshes = 50 draw calls\n * Now: 1 InstancedMesh = 1 draw call\n */\nfunction RowBackgrounds({\n  trainCount,\n  totalDays,\n  opacity = 1,\n  viewportBounds,\n}: {\n  trainCount: number;\n  totalDays: number;\n  opacity?: number;\n  viewportBounds?: ViewportBounds;\n}) {\n  const totalWidth = totalDays * pxPerDay;\n  const meshRef = useRef<InstancedMesh>(null);\n  const tempObject = useMemo(() => new Object3D(), []);\n\n  // Calculate visible rows based on viewport\n  const visibleRows = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!viewportBounds) {\n      return Array.from({ length: trainCount }, (_, i) => i);\n    }\n    const minTrainIndex = Math.max(0, Math.floor(-viewportBounds.maxY / pxPerTrain) - 1);\n    const maxTrainIndex = Math.min(trainCount - 1, Math.ceil(-viewportBounds.minY / pxPerTrain) + 1);\n    return Array.from({ length: maxTrainIndex - minTrainIndex + 1 }, (_, i) => minTrainIndex + i);\n  }, [trainCount, viewportBounds]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!meshRef.current || visibleRows.length === 0) return;\n\n    const mesh = meshRef.current;\n    visibleRows.forEach((trainIndex, i) => {\n      tempObject.position.set(totalWidth / 2, -trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2, -0.1);\n      tempObject.scale.set(totalWidth, pxPerTrain, 1);\n      tempObject.updateMatrix();\n      mesh.setMatrixAt(i, tempObject.matrix);\n      mesh.setColorAt(i, new Color(trainIndex % 2 === 0 ? ROW_BG_EVEN : ROW_BG_ODD));\n    });\n    mesh.instanceMatrix.needsUpdate = true;\n    if (mesh.instanceColor) {\n      mesh.instanceColor.needsUpdate = true;\n    }\n  }, [visibleRows, totalWidth, tempObject]);\n\n  if (visibleRows.length === 0) return null;\n\n  return (\n    <instancedMesh ref={meshRef} args={[undefined, undefined, visibleRows.length]}>\n      <planeGeometry args={[1, 1]} />\n      <meshBasicMaterial transparent opacity={0.5 * opacity} />\n    </instancedMesh>\n  );\n}\n\n// Dependency line color\nconst DEPENDENCY_LINE_COLOR = '#8b5cf6'; // Purple-500 for visibility\nconst DEPENDENCY_ARROW_COLOR = '#7c3aed'; // Purple-600 for arrow heads\n\n/**\n * Dependency Lines between tasks (F023)\n *\n * Renders curved lines from predecessor task to dependent task with arrow heads.\n * Only renders dependencies where both tasks are in the visible set.\n */\nfunction DependencyLines({\n  tasks,\n  opacity = 1,\n  viewportBounds,\n}: {\n  tasks: TaskRender[];\n  opacity?: number;\n  viewportBounds?: ViewportBounds;\n}) {\n  // Build a map of task ID to task for quick lookup\n  const taskMap = useMemo(() => {\n    return new Map(tasks.map((t) => [t.id, t]));\n  }, [tasks]);\n\n  // Find dependencies where both predecessor and dependent are visible\n  const dependencies = useMemo(() => {\n    const deps: Array<{ from: TaskRender; to: TaskRender }> = [];\n\n    for (const task of tasks) {\n      if (task.predecessorId) {\n        const predecessor = taskMap.get(task.predecessorId);\n        if (predecessor) {\n          deps.push({ from: predecessor, to: task });\n        }\n      }\n    }\n\n    return deps;\n  }, [tasks, taskMap]);\n\n  // Don't render during low opacity transitions (performance)\n  if (opacity < 0.3 || dependencies.length === 0) return null;\n\n  return (\n    <group>\n      {dependencies.map(({ from, to }, index) => {\n        // Calculate connection points\n        // From: right edge of predecessor task (end)\n        const fromX = (from.startDay + from.duration) * pxPerDay;\n        const fromY = -from.trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2;\n\n        // To: left edge of dependent task (start)\n        const toX = to.startDay * pxPerDay;\n        const toY = -to.trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2;\n\n        // Create curved path using bezier-like points\n        const isSameRow = from.trainIndex === to.trainIndex;\n        const midX = (fromX + toX) / 2;\n\n        // Control points for curve\n        let points: Vector3[];\n        if (isSameRow) {\n          // Same row: simple horizontal line with slight vertical offset to avoid overlap\n          const offsetY = 8;\n          points = [\n            new Vector3(fromX, fromY + offsetY, 0.3),\n            new Vector3(midX, fromY + offsetY + 5, 0.3),\n            new Vector3(toX, toY + offsetY, 0.3),\n          ];\n        } else {\n          // Different rows: curved path\n          const controlOffset = Math.abs(toY - fromY) * 0.3;\n          points = [\n            new Vector3(fromX, fromY, 0.3),\n            new Vector3(fromX + controlOffset, fromY, 0.3),\n            new Vector3(midX, (fromY + toY) / 2, 0.3),\n            new Vector3(toX - controlOffset, toY, 0.3),\n            new Vector3(toX, toY, 0.3),\n          ];\n        }\n\n        // Arrow head points (triangle at the destination)\n        const arrowSize = 6;\n        const lastPoint = points[points.length - 1];\n        const secondLastPoint = points[points.length - 2];\n\n        // Direction vector for arrow\n        const direction = new Vector3().subVectors(lastPoint, secondLastPoint).normalize();\n        const perpendicular = new Vector3(-direction.y, direction.x, 0);\n\n        const arrowTip = lastPoint.clone();\n        const arrowBase1 = lastPoint.clone().sub(direction.clone().multiplyScalar(arrowSize)).add(perpendicular.clone().multiplyScalar(arrowSize / 2));\n        const arrowBase2 = lastPoint.clone().sub(direction.clone().multiplyScalar(arrowSize)).sub(perpendicular.clone().multiplyScalar(arrowSize / 2));\n\n        const arrowPoints = [\n          arrowTip,\n          arrowBase1,\n          arrowBase2,\n          arrowTip, // Close the triangle\n        ];\n\n        const key = `dep-${from.id}-${to.id}`;\n\n        return (\n          <group key={key}>\n            {/* Main dependency line */}\n            <Line\n              points={points}\n              color={DEPENDENCY_LINE_COLOR}\n              lineWidth={2}\n              opacity={opacity * 0.8}\n              transparent\n            />\n            {/* Arrow head */}\n            <Line\n              points={arrowPoints}\n              color={DEPENDENCY_ARROW_COLOR}\n              lineWidth={2}\n              opacity={opacity}\n              transparent\n            />\n          </group>\n        );\n      })}\n    </group>\n  );\n}\n\n/**\n * Focus ring effect layer (F021)\n * Renders a ring around the focused task for accessibility\n */\nfunction FocusRing({\n  tasks,\n  focusedTaskId,\n  opacity = 1,\n}: {\n  tasks: TaskRender[];\n  focusedTaskId: string | null;\n  opacity?: number;\n}) {\n  const focusedTask = useMemo(\n    () => (focusedTaskId ? tasks.find((t) => t.id === focusedTaskId) : null),\n    [tasks, focusedTaskId]\n  );\n\n  const meshRef = useRef<InstancedMesh>(null);\n  const tempObject = useMemo(() => new Object3D(), []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!meshRef.current) return;\n\n    const mesh = meshRef.current;\n\n    if (focusedTask) {\n      const width = focusedTask.duration * pxPerDay + 6;\n      const height = CARD_HEIGHT + 6;\n      const x = focusedTask.startDay * pxPerDay + (focusedTask.duration * pxPerDay) / 2;\n      const y = -focusedTask.trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2;\n      const z = 0.12;\n\n      tempObject.position.set(x, y, z);\n      tempObject.scale.set(width, height, 1);\n      tempObject.updateMatrix();\n      mesh.setMatrixAt(0, tempObject.matrix);\n    } else {\n      // Hide the ring by scaling to zero\n      tempObject.scale.set(0, 0, 1);\n      tempObject.updateMatrix();\n      mesh.setMatrixAt(0, tempObject.matrix);\n    }\n\n    mesh.instanceMatrix.needsUpdate = true;\n  }, [focusedTask, tempObject]);\n\n  return (\n    <instancedMesh ref={meshRef} args={[undefined, undefined, 1]}>\n      <planeGeometry args={[1, 1]} />\n      <meshBasicMaterial\n        color={FOCUS_COLOR}\n        transparent\n        opacity={0.4 * opacity}\n      />\n    </instancedMesh>\n  );\n}\n\n/**\n * MicroLayer Component\n *\n * Optimized for performance with:\n * - Frustum culling for tasks\n * - InstancedMesh for grid lines and row backgrounds\n * - Limited HTML labels (max 50)\n * - Dependency lines between tasks (F023)\n * - Keyboard focus indicators (F021)\n */\nexport function MicroLayer({\n  tasks,\n  trainCount,\n  opacity = 1,\n  viewportBounds,\n  hoveredTaskId,\n  selectedTaskId,\n  focusedTaskId,\n}: MicroLayerProps) {\n  // Calculate total days\n  const totalDays = useMemo(() => {\n    if (tasks.length === 0) return 365 * 10;\n    const maxDay = Math.max(...tasks.map((t) => t.startDay + t.duration));\n    return Math.max(maxDay + 30, 365 * 10);\n  }, [tasks]);\n\n  // Filter to visible tasks only (frustum culling)\n  const visibleTasks = useMemo(\n    () => filterVisibleTasks(tasks, viewportBounds),\n    [tasks, viewportBounds]\n  );\n\n  return (\n    <group>\n      {/* Row backgrounds - InstancedMesh */}\n      <RowBackgrounds\n        trainCount={trainCount}\n        totalDays={totalDays}\n        opacity={opacity}\n        viewportBounds={viewportBounds}\n      />\n\n      {/* Grid lines - InstancedMesh */}\n      <GridLines\n        totalDays={totalDays}\n        trainCount={trainCount}\n        opacity={opacity}\n        viewportBounds={viewportBounds}\n      />\n\n      {/* Conflict glow effects - only visible tasks */}\n      <ConflictGlows tasks={visibleTasks} opacity={opacity} />\n\n      {/* Focus ring effect (F021 - behind focused task card) */}\n      <FocusRing tasks={visibleTasks} focusedTaskId={focusedTaskId ?? null} opacity={opacity} />\n\n      {/* Task cards - only visible tasks */}\n      <TaskCards\n        tasks={visibleTasks}\n        opacity={opacity}\n        hoveredTaskId={hoveredTaskId}\n        selectedTaskId={selectedTaskId}\n        focusedTaskId={focusedTaskId}\n      />\n\n      {/* Task labels (HTML overlay) - only visible tasks, max 50 */}\n      <TaskLabels tasks={visibleTasks} opacity={opacity} />\n\n      {/* Dependency lines between tasks (F023) - only visible tasks */}\n      <DependencyLines tasks={visibleTasks} opacity={opacity} viewportBounds={viewportBounds} />\n    </group>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":455,"oldLines":7,"newStart":455,"newLines":7,"lines":[" function DependencyLines({","   tasks,","   opacity Default: 1 */\n  opacity?: number;\n  /** Viewport bounds for frustum culling */\n  viewportBounds?: ViewportBounds;\n  /** Currently hovered task ID for highlight effect */\n  hoveredTaskId?: string | null;\n  /** Currently selected task ID for selection highlight (F019) */\n  selectedTaskId?: string | null;\n  /** Currently keyboard-focused task ID for focus indicator (F021) */\n  focusedTaskId?: string | null;\n}\n\nconst { pxPerDay, pxPerTrain } = DEFAULT_VIEW_CONFIG;\n\n// Task card dimensions\nconst CARD_PADDING = 2;\nconst CARD_HEIGHT = pxPerTrain - CARD_PADDING * 2 - 2; // Slightly smaller for grid visibility\n\n// Color mappings (matching MesoLayer)\nconst COLORS: Record<string, string> = {\n  blue: '#3b82f6',\n  orange: '#f59e0b',\n  gray: '#9ca3af',\n};\nconst CONFLICT_COLOR = '#ef4444';\n\n// Grid colors\nconst GRID_COLOR_MAJOR = '#d1d5db'; // Gray-300\nconst GRID_COLOR_MINOR = '#e5e7eb'; // Gray-200\n\n// Row background colors\nconst ROW_BG_EVEN = '#ffffff';\nconst ROW_BG_ODD = '#f8fafc';\n\n/**\n * Filter tasks that are visible within the viewport bounds\n * This is the core of frustum culling for performance\n */\nfunction filterVisibleTasks(tasks: TaskRender[], viewportBounds?: ViewportBounds): TaskRender[] {\n  if (!viewportBounds) return tasks;\n\n  // Add padding to viewport bounds (render slightly outside visible area for smooth panning)\n  const padding = 100; // world units\n  const minX = viewportBounds.minX - padding;\n  const maxX = viewportBounds.maxX + padding;\n  const minY = viewportBounds.minY - padding;\n  const maxY = viewportBounds.maxY + padding;\n\n  return tasks.filter((task) => {\n    const taskStartX = task.startDay * pxPerDay;\n    const taskEndX = taskStartX + task.duration * pxPerDay;\n    const taskY = -task.trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2;\n\n    // Check if task overlaps with viewport\n    const xOverlap = taskEndX >= minX && taskStartX <= maxX;\n    const yOverlap = taskY + pxPerTrain / 2 >= minY && taskY - pxPerTrain / 2 <= maxY;\n\n    return xOverlap && yOverlap;\n  });\n}\n\n// Highlight color multiplier for hovered tasks\nconst HOVER_BRIGHTNESS = 1.3;\n\n// Selection indicator color (distinct cyan/teal)\nconst SELECTION_COLOR = '#06b6d4'; // cyan-500\n\n// Focus indicator color (F021 - keyboard focus)\nconst FOCUS_COLOR = '#8b5cf6'; // violet-500\n\n/**\n * Brighten a color for hover effect\n */\nfunction brightenColor(hexColor: string, factor: number): Color {\n  const color = new Color(hexColor);\n  color.r = Math.min(1, color.r * factor);\n  color.g = Math.min(1, color.g * factor);\n  color.b = Math.min(1, color.b * factor);\n  return color;\n}\n\n/**\n * Task cards using InstancedMesh (same pattern as MesoLayer)\n */\nfunction TaskCards({\n  tasks,\n  opacity = 1,\n  hoveredTaskId,\n  selectedTaskId,\n  focusedTaskId,\n}: {\n  tasks: TaskRender[];\n  opacity?: number;\n  hoveredTaskId?: string | null;\n  selectedTaskId?: string | null;\n  focusedTaskId?: string | null;\n}) {\n  const meshRef = useRef<InstancedMesh>(null);\n  const tempObject = useMemo(() => new Object3D(), []);\n  const tempColor = useMemo(() => new Color(), []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!meshRef.current || tasks.length === 0) return;\n\n    const mesh = meshRef.current;\n\n    tasks.forEach((task, i) => {\n      const width = task.duration * pxPerDay - CARD_PADDING * 2;\n      const height = CARD_HEIGHT;\n      const x = task.startDay * pxPerDay + width / 2 + CARD_PADDING;\n      const y = -task.trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2;\n      // Z ordering: selected > focused > conflict > hovered > normal\n      const isSelected = task.id === selectedTaskId;\n      const isFocused = task.id === focusedTaskId;\n      const isHovered = task.id === hoveredTaskId;\n      const z = isSelected ? 0.2 : isFocused ? 0.15 : task.hasConflict ? 0.1 : isHovered ? 0.05 : 0;\n\n      tempObject.position.set(x, y, z);\n      tempObject.scale.set(width, height, 1);\n      tempObject.updateMatrix();\n      mesh.setMatrixAt(i, tempObject.matrix);\n\n      // Set color: selected gets distinct color, focused gets focus color, hovered gets brightened, normal is base\n      if (isSelected) {\n        tempColor.set(SELECTION_COLOR);\n        mesh.setColorAt(i, tempColor);\n      } else if (isFocused) {\n        tempColor.set(FOCUS_COLOR);\n        mesh.setColorAt(i, tempColor);\n      } else if (isHovered) {\n        const baseColor = task.hasConflict ? CONFLICT_COLOR : COLORS[task.color];\n        const brightened = brightenColor(baseColor, HOVER_BRIGHTNESS);\n        mesh.setColorAt(i, brightened);\n      } else {\n        const baseColor = task.hasConflict ? CONFLICT_COLOR : COLORS[task.color];\n        tempColor.set(baseColor);\n        mesh.setColorAt(i, tempColor);\n      }\n    });\n\n    mesh.instanceMatrix.needsUpdate = true;\n    if (mesh.instanceColor) {\n      mesh.instanceColor.needsUpdate = true;\n    }\n  }, [tasks, tempObject, tempColor, hoveredTaskId, selectedTaskId, focusedTaskId]);\n\n  if (tasks.length === 0) return null;\n\n  return (\n    <instancedMesh ref={meshRef} args={[undefined, undefined, tasks.length]}>\n      <planeGeometry args={[1, 1]} />\n      <meshBasicMaterial toneMapped={false} transparent={opacity < 1} opacity={opacity} />\n    </instancedMesh>\n  );\n}\n\n/**\n * Conflict glow effects (behind task cards)\n */\nfunction ConflictGlows({ tasks, opacity = 1 }: { tasks: TaskRender[]; opacity?: number }) {\n  const conflictTasks = useMemo(() => tasks.filter((t) => t.hasConflict), [tasks]);\n  const meshRef = useRef<InstancedMesh>(null);\n  const tempObject = useMemo(() => new Object3D(), []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!meshRef.current || conflictTasks.length === 0) return;\n\n    const mesh = meshRef.current;\n\n    conflictTasks.forEach((task, i) => {\n      const width = task.duration * pxPerDay + 4;\n      const height = CARD_HEIGHT + 4;\n      const x = task.startDay * pxPerDay + (task.duration * pxPerDay) / 2;\n      const y = -task.trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2;\n      const z = -0.05;\n\n      tempObject.position.set(x, y, z);\n      tempObject.scale.set(width, height, 1);\n      tempObject.updateMatrix();\n      mesh.setMatrixAt(i, tempObject.matrix);\n    });\n\n    mesh.instanceMatrix.needsUpdate = true;\n  }, [conflictTasks, tempObject]);\n\n  if (conflictTasks.length === 0) return null;\n\n  return (\n    <instancedMesh ref={meshRef} args={[undefined, undefined, conflictTasks.length]}>\n      <planeGeometry args={[1, 1]} />\n      <meshBasicMaterial color={CONFLICT_COLOR} transparent opacity={0.3 * opacity} />\n    </instancedMesh>\n  );\n}\n\n/**\n * HTML labels for tasks - ONLY for visible tasks (lazy rendering)\n * Maximum of 50 labels rendered at once for performance\n */\nfunction TaskLabels({ tasks, opacity = 1 }: { tasks: TaskRender[]; opacity?: number }) {\n  const { camera } = useThree();\n  const zoom = (camera as any).zoom || 1;\n\n  // Only show labels on tasks wide enough (> 40 screen pixels)\n  // And limit to max 50 labels for performance\n  const labeledTasks = useMemo(() => {\n    const minWidthForLabel = 40 / zoom; // Convert screen pixels to world pixels\n    const filtered = tasks.filter((t) => t.duration * pxPerDay > minWidthForLabel);\n    // Sort by width (largest first) and take top 50\n    return filtered\n      .sort((a, b) => b.duration - a.duration)\n      .slice(0, 50);\n  }, [tasks, zoom]);\n\n  // Don't render labels during low opacity transitions (performance optimization)\n  if (opacity < 0.3) return null;\n\n  return (\n    <>\n      {labeledTasks.map((task) => {\n        const width = task.duration * pxPerDay;\n        const x = task.startDay * pxPerDay + width / 2;\n        const y = -task.trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2;\n        const label = task.type.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + task.type.slice(1);\n        // F022: Generate descriptive aria-label for screen readers\n        const ariaLabel = `${label} task, Train ${task.trainIndex + 1}, Day ${task.startDay}, Duration ${task.duration} days${task.hasConflict ? ', has conflict' : ''}`;\n\n        return (\n          <Html\n            key={task.id}\n            position={[x, y, 0.2]}\n            center\n            style={{ pointerEvents: 'none', opacity }}\n          >\n            <div\n              role=\"img\"\n              aria-label={ariaLabel}\n              style={{\n                color: 'white',\n                fontSize: '10px',\n                fontFamily: 'system-ui, sans-serif',\n                fontWeight: 600,\n                textShadow: '0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)',\n                whiteSpace: 'nowrap',\n              }}\n            >\n              {label}\n            </div>\n          </Html>\n        );\n      })}\n    </>\n  );\n}\n\n/**\n * Grid lines using InstancedMesh (OPTIMIZED - single draw call)\n * Previously: ~251 individual meshes = 251 draw calls\n * Now: 2 InstancedMesh = 2 draw calls\n */\nfunction GridLines({\n  totalDays,\n  trainCount,\n  opacity = 1,\n  viewportBounds,\n}: {\n  totalDays: number;\n  trainCount: number;\n  opacity?: number;\n  viewportBounds?: ViewportBounds;\n}) {\n  const totalWidth = totalDays * pxPerDay;\n  const totalHeight = trainCount * pxPerTrain;\n\n  // Horizontal grid lines (train boundaries) - using InstancedMesh\n  const hMeshRef = useRef<InstancedMesh>(null);\n  const hTempObject = useMemo(() => new Object3D(), []);\n\n  // Vertical grid lines (week boundaries) - using InstancedMesh\n  const vMeshRef = useRef<InstancedMesh>(null);\n  const vTempObject = useMemo(() => new Object3D(), []);\n\n  // Calculate visible horizontal lines based on viewport\n  const visibleHLines = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!viewportBounds) {\n      return Array.from({ length: trainCount + 1 }, (_, i) => i);\n    }\n    const minTrainIndex = Math.max(0, Math.floor(-viewportBounds.maxY / pxPerTrain) - 1);\n    const maxTrainIndex = Math.min(trainCount, Math.ceil(-viewportBounds.minY / pxPerTrain) + 1);\n    return Array.from({ length: maxTrainIndex - minTrainIndex + 1 }, (_, i) => minTrainIndex + i);\n  }, [trainCount, viewportBounds]);\n\n  // Calculate visible vertical lines (weeks) based on viewport\n  const visibleVLines = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!viewportBounds) {\n      const lines = [];\n      for (let day = 0; day <= totalDays; day += 7) {\n        lines.push(day);\n      }\n      return lines.slice(0, 200);\n    }\n    const minDay = Math.max(0, Math.floor(viewportBounds.minX / pxPerDay / 7) * 7 - 7);\n    const maxDay = Math.min(totalDays, Math.ceil(viewportBounds.maxX / pxPerDay / 7) * 7 + 7);\n    const lines = [];\n    for (let day = minDay; day <= maxDay; day += 7) {\n      lines.push(day);\n    }\n    return lines;\n  }, [totalDays, viewportBounds]);\n\n  // Update horizontal lines InstancedMesh\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!hMeshRef.current || visibleHLines.length === 0) return;\n\n    const mesh = hMeshRef.current;\n    visibleHLines.forEach((trainIndex, i) => {\n      hTempObject.position.set(totalWidth / 2, -trainIndex * pxPerTrain, -0.05);\n      hTempObject.scale.set(totalWidth, 1, 1);\n      hTempObject.updateMatrix();\n      mesh.setMatrixAt(i, hTempObject.matrix);\n    });\n    mesh.instanceMatrix.needsUpdate = true;\n  }, [visibleHLines, totalWidth, hTempObject]);\n\n  // Update vertical lines InstancedMesh\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!vMeshRef.current || visibleVLines.length === 0) return;\n\n    const mesh = vMeshRef.current;\n    visibleVLines.forEach((day, i) => {\n      const isMajor = day % 30 === 0;\n      vTempObject.position.set(day * pxPerDay, -totalHeight / 2, -0.05);\n      vTempObject.scale.set(isMajor ? 1.5 : 1, totalHeight, 1);\n      vTempObject.updateMatrix();\n      mesh.setMatrixAt(i, vTempObject.matrix);\n      mesh.setColorAt(i, new Color(isMajor ? GRID_COLOR_MAJOR : GRID_COLOR_MINOR));\n    });\n    mesh.instanceMatrix.needsUpdate = true;\n    if (mesh.instanceColor) {\n      mesh.instanceColor.needsUpdate = true;\n    }\n  }, [visibleVLines, totalHeight, vTempObject]);\n\n  return (\n    <group>\n      {/* Horizontal lines - InstancedMesh */}\n      {visibleHLines.length > 0 && (\n        <instancedMesh ref={hMeshRef} args={[undefined, undefined, visibleHLines.length]}>\n          <planeGeometry args={[1, 1]} />\n          <meshBasicMaterial color={GRID_COLOR_MAJOR} transparent opacity={0.5 * opacity} />\n        </instancedMesh>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Vertical lines - InstancedMesh */}\n      {visibleVLines.length > 0 && (\n        <instancedMesh ref={vMeshRef} args={[undefined, undefined, visibleVLines.length]}>\n          <planeGeometry args={[1, 1]} />\n          <meshBasicMaterial transparent opacity={0.4 * opacity} />\n        </instancedMesh>\n      )}\n    </group>\n  );\n}\n\n/**\n * Row backgrounds using InstancedMesh (OPTIMIZED - single draw call)\n * Previously: 50 individual meshes = 50 draw calls\n * Now: 1 InstancedMesh = 1 draw call\n */\nfunction RowBackgrounds({\n  trainCount,\n  totalDays,\n  opacity = 1,\n  viewportBounds,\n}: {\n  trainCount: number;\n  totalDays: number;\n  opacity?: number;\n  viewportBounds?: ViewportBounds;\n}) {\n  const totalWidth = totalDays * pxPerDay;\n  const meshRef = useRef<InstancedMesh>(null);\n  const tempObject = useMemo(() => new Object3D(), []);\n\n  // Calculate visible rows based on viewport\n  const visibleRows = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!viewportBounds) {\n      return Array.from({ length: trainCount }, (_, i) => i);\n    }\n    const minTrainIndex = Math.max(0, Math.floor(-viewportBounds.maxY / pxPerTrain) - 1);\n    const maxTrainIndex = Math.min(trainCount - 1, Math.ceil(-viewportBounds.minY / pxPerTrain) + 1);\n    return Array.from({ length: maxTrainIndex - minTrainIndex + 1 }, (_, i) => minTrainIndex + i);\n  }, [trainCount, viewportBounds]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!meshRef.current || visibleRows.length === 0) return;\n\n    const mesh = meshRef.current;\n    visibleRows.forEach((trainIndex, i) => {\n      tempObject.position.set(totalWidth / 2, -trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2, -0.1);\n      tempObject.scale.set(totalWidth, pxPerTrain, 1);\n      tempObject.updateMatrix();\n      mesh.setMatrixAt(i, tempObject.matrix);\n      mesh.setColorAt(i, new Color(trainIndex % 2 === 0 ? ROW_BG_EVEN : ROW_BG_ODD));\n    });\n    mesh.instanceMatrix.needsUpdate = true;\n    if (mesh.instanceColor) {\n      mesh.instanceColor.needsUpdate = true;\n    }\n  }, [visibleRows, totalWidth, tempObject]);\n\n  if (visibleRows.length === 0) return null;\n\n  return (\n    <instancedMesh ref={meshRef} args={[undefined, undefined, visibleRows.length]}>\n      <planeGeometry args={[1, 1]} />\n      <meshBasicMaterial transparent opacity={0.5 * opacity} />\n    </instancedMesh>\n  );\n}\n\n// Dependency line color\nconst DEPENDENCY_LINE_COLOR = '#8b5cf6'; // Purple-500 for visibility\nconst DEPENDENCY_ARROW_COLOR = '#7c3aed'; // Purple-600 for arrow heads\n\n/**\n * Dependency Lines between tasks (F023)\n *\n * Renders curved lines from predecessor task to dependent task with arrow heads.\n * Only renders dependencies where both tasks are in the visible set.\n */\nfunction DependencyLines({\n  tasks,\n  opacity = 1,\n  viewportBounds: _viewportBounds,\n}: {\n  tasks: TaskRender[];\n  opacity?: number;\n  viewportBounds?: ViewportBounds;\n}) {\n  // Build a map of task ID to task for quick lookup\n  const taskMap = useMemo(() => {\n    return new Map(tasks.map((t) => [t.id, t]));\n  }, [tasks]);\n\n  // Find dependencies where both predecessor and dependent are visible\n  const dependencies = useMemo(() => {\n    const deps: Array<{ from: TaskRender; to: TaskRender }> = [];\n\n    for (const task of tasks) {\n      if (task.predecessorId) {\n        const predecessor = taskMap.get(task.predecessorId);\n        if (predecessor) {\n          deps.push({ from: predecessor, to: task });\n        }\n      }\n    }\n\n    return deps;\n  }, [tasks, taskMap]);\n\n  // Don't render during low opacity transitions (performance)\n  if (opacity < 0.3 || dependencies.length === 0) return null;\n\n  return (\n    <group>\n      {dependencies.map(({ from, to }, index) => {\n        // Calculate connection points\n        // From: right edge of predecessor task (end)\n        const fromX = (from.startDay + from.duration) * pxPerDay;\n        const fromY = -from.trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2;\n\n        // To: left edge of dependent task (start)\n        const toX = to.startDay * pxPerDay;\n        const toY = -to.trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2;\n\n        // Create curved path using bezier-like points\n        const isSameRow = from.trainIndex === to.trainIndex;\n        const midX = (fromX + toX) / 2;\n\n        // Control points for curve\n        let points: Vector3[];\n        if (isSameRow) {\n          // Same row: simple horizontal line with slight vertical offset to avoid overlap\n          const offsetY = 8;\n          points = [\n            new Vector3(fromX, fromY + offsetY, 0.3),\n            new Vector3(midX, fromY + offsetY + 5, 0.3),\n            new Vector3(toX, toY + offsetY, 0.3),\n          ];\n        } else {\n          // Different rows: curved path\n          const controlOffset = Math.abs(toY - fromY) * 0.3;\n          points = [\n            new Vector3(fromX, fromY, 0.3),\n            new Vector3(fromX + controlOffset, fromY, 0.3),\n            new Vector3(midX, (fromY + toY) / 2, 0.3),\n            new Vector3(toX - controlOffset, toY, 0.3),\n            new Vector3(toX, toY, 0.3),\n          ];\n        }\n\n        // Arrow head points (triangle at the destination)\n        const arrowSize = 6;\n        const lastPoint = points[points.length - 1];\n        const secondLastPoint = points[points.length - 2];\n\n        // Direction vector for arrow\n        const direction = new Vector3().subVectors(lastPoint, secondLastPoint).normalize();\n        const perpendicular = new Vector3(-direction.y, direction.x, 0);\n\n        const arrowTip = lastPoint.clone();\n        const arrowBase1 = lastPoint.clone().sub(direction.clone().multiplyScalar(arrowSize)).add(perpendicular.clone().multiplyScalar(arrowSize / 2));\n        const arrowBase2 = lastPoint.clone().sub(direction.clone().multiplyScalar(arrowSize)).sub(perpendicular.clone().multiplyScalar(arrowSize / 2));\n\n        const arrowPoints = [\n          arrowTip,\n          arrowBase1,\n          arrowBase2,\n          arrowTip, // Close the triangle\n        ];\n\n        const key = `dep-${from.id}-${to.id}`;\n\n        return (\n          <group key={key}>\n            {/* Main dependency line */}\n            <Line\n              points={points}\n              color={DEPENDENCY_LINE_COLOR}\n              lineWidth={2}\n              opacity={opacity * 0.8}\n              transparent\n            />\n            {/* Arrow head */}\n            <Line\n              points={arrowPoints}\n              color={DEPENDENCY_ARROW_COLOR}\n              lineWidth={2}\n              opacity={opacity}\n              transparent\n            />\n          </group>\n        );\n      })}\n    </group>\n  );\n}\n\n/**\n * Focus ring effect layer (F021)\n * Renders a ring around the focused task for accessibility\n */\nfunction FocusRing({\n  tasks,\n  focusedTaskId,\n  opacity = 1,\n}: {\n  tasks: TaskRender[];\n  focusedTaskId: string | null;\n  opacity?: number;\n}) {\n  const focusedTask = useMemo(\n    () => (focusedTaskId ? tasks.find((t) => t.id === focusedTaskId) : null),\n    [tasks, focusedTaskId]\n  );\n\n  const meshRef = useRef<InstancedMesh>(null);\n  const tempObject = useMemo(() => new Object3D(), []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!meshRef.current) return;\n\n    const mesh = meshRef.current;\n\n    if (focusedTask) {\n      const width = focusedTask.duration * pxPerDay + 6;\n      const height = CARD_HEIGHT + 6;\n      const x = focusedTask.startDay * pxPerDay + (focusedTask.duration * pxPerDay) / 2;\n      const y = -focusedTask.trainIndex * pxPerTrain - pxPerTrain / 2;\n      const z = 0.12;\n\n      tempObject.position.set(x, y, z);\n      tempObject.scale.set(width, height, 1);\n      tempObject.updateMatrix();\n      mesh.setMatrixAt(0, tempObject.matrix);\n    } else {\n      // Hide the ring by scaling to zero\n      tempObject.scale.set(0, 0, 1);\n      tempObject.updateMatrix();\n      mesh.setMatrixAt(0, tempObject.matrix);\n    }\n\n    mesh.instanceMatrix.needsUpdate = true;\n  }, [focusedTask, tempObject]);\n\n  return (\n    <instancedMesh ref={meshRef} args={[undefined, undefined, 1]}>\n      <planeGeometry args={[1, 1]} />\n      <meshBasicMaterial\n        color={FOCUS_COLOR}\n        transparent\n        opacity={0.4 * opacity}\n      />\n    </instancedMesh>\n  );\n}\n\n/**\n * MicroLayer Component\n *\n * Optimized for performance with:\n * - Frustum culling for tasks\n * - InstancedMesh for grid lines and row backgrounds\n * - Limited HTML labels (max 50)\n * - Dependency lines between tasks (F023)\n * - Keyboard focus indicators (F021)\n */\nexport function MicroLayer({\n  tasks,\n  trainCount,\n  opacity = 1,\n  viewportBounds,\n  hoveredTaskId,\n  selectedTaskId,\n  focusedTaskId,\n}: MicroLayerProps) {\n  // Calculate total days\n  const totalDays = useMemo(() => {\n    if (tasks.length === 0) return 365 * 10;\n    const maxDay = Math.max(...tasks.map((t) => t.startDay + t.duration));\n    return Math.max(maxDay + 30, 365 * 10);\n  }, [tasks]);\n\n  // Filter to visible tasks only (frustum culling)\n  const visibleTasks = useMemo(\n    () => filterVisibleTasks(tasks, viewportBounds),\n    [tasks, viewportBounds]\n  );\n\n  return (\n    <group>\n      {/* Row backgrounds - InstancedMesh */}\n      <RowBackgrounds\n        trainCount={trainCount}\n        totalDays={totalDays}\n        opacity={opacity}\n        viewportBounds={viewportBounds}\n      />\n\n      {/* Grid lines - InstancedMesh */}\n      <GridLines\n        totalDays={totalDays}\n        trainCount={trainCount}\n        opacity={opacity}\n        viewportBounds={viewportBounds}\n      />\n\n      {/* Conflict glow effects - only visible tasks */}\n      <ConflictGlows tasks={visibleTasks} opacity={opacity} />\n\n      {/* Focus ring effect (F021 - behind focused task card) */}\n      <FocusRing tasks={visibleTasks} focusedTaskId={focusedTaskId ?? null} opacity={opacity} />\n\n      {/* Task cards - only visible tasks */}\n      <TaskCards\n        tasks={visibleTasks}\n        opacity={opacity}\n        hoveredTaskId={hoveredTaskId}\n        selectedTaskId={selectedTaskId}\n        focusedTaskId={focusedTaskId}\n      />\n\n      {/* Task labels (HTML overlay) - only visible tasks, max 50 */}\n Coordinate System:\n * - X: 0 = first day, positive = future (right)\n * - Y: 0 = first train (TRAIN-001), negative = more trains (down)\n *\n * References:\n * - D3.js zoom:
